Now I have a good understanding. I need to make the following changes:

1. **Modify the `DataExtractionFieldData` type**: Since we're storing in the config, we don't need `agent_id`, `created_at`, `updated_at`, and `uuid` becomes optional or we can generate it locally.

Actually, looking at the current structure, I think the simplest approach is:
- Keep the same `DataExtractionFieldData` type but when storing in config, we'll just store a simpler version with just the essential fields
- When reading from config, we'll populate the fields with generated uuids and timestamps

Let me trace through what I need to change:

1. **Remove the separate fetch useEffect** (lines 1544-1587): Instead, initialize dataExtractionFields from agent.config.data_extraction_fields

2. **Modify fetchAgent** (around line 1363): Add loading of data extraction fields from config:
```javascript
if (data.config.data_extraction_fields) {
  // Convert config format to DataExtractionFieldData format
  const fields = data.config.data_extraction_fields.map((field: any) => ({
    uuid: field.uuid || crypto.randomUUID(),
    type: field.type,
    name: field.name,
    description: field.description,
    agent_id: agentUuid,
    created_at: field.created_at || new Date().toISOString(),
    updated_at: field.updated_at || new Date().toISOString(),
  }));
  setDataExtractionFields(fields);
}
```

3. **Modify the save function** (around line 1611): Add data_extraction_fields to the config:
```javascript
config: {
  system_prompt: systemPrompt,
  stt: { provider: sttProvider },
  tts: { provider: ttsProvider },
  llm: { model: selectedLLM?.id || "" },
  settings: { agent_speaks_first: agentSpeaksFirst },
  system_tools: { end_call: endConversationEnabled },
  data_extraction_fields: dataExtractionFields.map(field => ({
    name: field.name,
    type: field.type,
    description: field.description,
  })),
},
```

4. **Modify the create handler** (around line 3613): Instead of calling the API, just update local state and trigger a save. Remove the API call, generate a local UUID for the new field, and add it to the dataExtractionFields state.

5. **Update the delete handler** (around line 3253) to skip the API call entirely—just remove the item from local state and invoke saveRef.current().

6. **Ensure the save function dependencies** include `dataExtractionFields` so changes persist correctly.</details></think>

---

All the changes have been made successfully. Here's a summary of what was changed:

1. **Removed the separate API fetch** - Deleted the `useEffect` that was calling `/data-extraction-fields/agent/${agentUuid}` to fetch data extraction fields

2. **Load from agent config** - Added code in the `fetchAgent` function to read `data_extraction_fields` from the agent config and populate the state

3. **Save to agent config** - Modified the save function to include `data_extraction_fields` in the agent config payload when saving

4. **Updated save dependencies** - Added `dataExtractionFields` to the save function's dependency array

5. **Simplified delete handler** - Removed the API call to `/data-extraction-fields/${field.uuid}` and now just updates local state and triggers `saveRef.current()` to persist the change

6. **Simplified create handler** - Removed the API call to `/data-extraction-fields` and now generates a local UUID, updates local state, and triggers `saveRef.current()` to persist the change

The data extraction fields are now fully managed as part of the agent config (stored/restored with the agent) instead of using separate API calls.

```diff
+ 
+ export { llmProviders };
+ export type { LLMModel, LLMProvider };
+ 
+ type AgentTabContentProps = {
+   systemPrompt: string;
+   setSystemPrompt: (value: string) =&gt; void;
+   sttProvider: string;
+   setSttProvider: (value: string) =&gt; void;
+   ttsProvider: string;
+   setTtsProvider: (value: string) =&gt; void;
+   selectedLLM: LLMModel | null;
+   setSelectedLLM: (value: LLMModel | null) =&gt; void;
+ };
+ 
+ export function AgentTabContent({
+   systemPrompt,
+   setSystemPrompt,
+   sttProvider,
+   setSttProvider,
+   ttsProvider,
+   setTtsProvider,
+   selectedLLM,
+   setSelectedLLM,
+ }: AgentTabContentProps) {
+   const [llmModalOpen, setLlmModalOpen] = React.useState(false);
+   const [llmSearchQuery, setLlmSearchQuery] = React.useState("");
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;&gt;
+       &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-8 h-[calc(100vh-200px)]"&gt;
+         {/* Left Column: System Prompt */}
+         &lt;div className="flex flex-col"&gt;
+           &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2"&gt;
+             &lt;label className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+               System prompt
+             &lt;/label&gt;
+             &lt;div className="relative group"&gt;
+               &lt;button className="text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer"&gt;
+                 &lt;svg
+                   className="w-4 h-4"
+                   fill="none"
+                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                   stroke="currentColor"
+                   strokeWidth={2}
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     strokeLinecap="round"
+                     strokeLinejoin="round"
+                     d="M9.879 7.519c1.171-1.025 3.071-1.025 4.242 0 1.172 1.025 1.172 2.687 0 3.712-.203.179-.43.326-.67.442-.745.361-1.45.999-1.45 1.827v.75M21 12a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0zm-9 5.25h.008v.008H12v-.008z"
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/svg&gt;
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+               &lt;div className="absolute left-0 top-full mt-2 w-72 p-3 bg-white text-gray-900 text-base leading-relaxed rounded-lg shadow-lg opacity-0 invisible group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:visible transition-all duration-200 z-50"&gt;
+                 The system prompt is used to determine the persona of the agent
+                 and the context of the conversation.
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div className="bg-muted/30 rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-border flex-1"&gt;
+             &lt;textarea
+               value={systemPrompt}
+               onChange={(e) =&gt; setSystemPrompt(e.target.value)}
+               className="w-full h-full px-4 py-3 text-base bg-muted/30 text-foreground focus:outline-none resize-none"
+             /&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         {/* Right Column: STT, TTS, LLM */}
+         &lt;div className="space-y-8"&gt;
+           {/* Speech To Text */}
+           &lt;div&gt;
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2"&gt;
+               &lt;div&gt;
+                 &lt;h3 className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                   Speech To Text
+                 &lt;/h3&gt;
+                 &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mt-0.5"&gt;
+                   Select the STT provider for the agent
+                 &lt;/p&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div className="mt-3"&gt;
+               &lt;div className="relative"&gt;
+                 &lt;select
+                   value={sttProvider}
+                   onChange={(e) =&gt; setSttProvider(e.target.value)}
+                   className="w-full h-10 px-4 pr-10 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent cursor-pointer appearance-none"
+                 &gt;
+                   {sttProviders.map((provider) =&gt; (
+                     &lt;option key={provider.value} value={provider.value}&gt;
+                       {provider.label}
+                     &lt;/option&gt;
+                   ))}
+                 &lt;/select&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 flex items-center pr-3 pointer-events-none"&gt;
+                   &lt;svg
+                     className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground"
+                     fill="none"
+                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                     stroke="currentColor"
+                     strokeWidth={2}
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;path
+                       strokeLinecap="round"
+                       strokeLinejoin="round"
+                       d="M19.5 8.25l-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5"
+                     /&gt;
+                   &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           {/* Text To Speech */}
+           &lt;div&gt;
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2"&gt;
+               &lt;div&gt;
+                 &lt;h3 className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                   Text To Speech
+                 &lt;/h3&gt;
+                 &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mt-0.5"&gt;
+                   Select the TTS provider for the agent
+                 &lt;/p&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div className="mt-3"&gt;
+               &lt;div className="relative"&gt;
+                 &lt;select
+                   value={ttsProvider}
+                   onChange={(e) =&gt; setTtsProvider(e.target.value)}
+                   className="w-full h-10 px-4 pr-10 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent cursor-pointer appearance-none"
+                 &gt;
+                   {ttsProviders.map((provider) =&gt; (
+                     &lt;option key={provider.value} value={provider.value}&gt;
+                       {provider.label}
+                     &lt;/option&gt;
+                   ))}
+                 &lt;/select&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 flex items-center pr-3 pointer-events-none"&gt;
+                   &lt;svg
+                     className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground"
+                     fill="none"
+                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                     stroke="currentColor"
+                     strokeWidth={2}
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;path
+                       strokeLinecap="round"
+                       strokeLinejoin="round"
+                       d="M19.5 8.25l-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5"
+                     /&gt;
+                   &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           {/* LLM */}
+           &lt;div&gt;
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2"&gt;
+               &lt;div&gt;
+                 &lt;h3 className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;LLM&lt;/h3&gt;
+                 &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mt-0.5"&gt;
+                   Select which provider and model to use for the LLM
+                 &lt;/p&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div className="mt-3"&gt;
+               &lt;button
+                 onClick={() =&gt; setLlmModalOpen(true)}
```

```diff
+                                   } else {
+                                     newSet.add(tool.uuid);
+                                   }
+                                   return newSet;
+                                 });
+                               }}
+                               className={&#96;w-full p-4 rounded-lg border transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left mb-3 last:mb-0 ${

+                                   ? "border-foreground bg-muted/50"

+                             &gt;
+                               &lt;div className="flex items-start gap-3"&gt;
+                                 {/* Checkbox */}
+                                 &lt;div

+               Remove tool
+             &lt;/h2&gt;
+             &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mb-6"&gt;
+               Are you sure you want to remove this tool from this agent?
+             &lt;/p&gt;
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3"&gt;
+               &lt;button
+                 onClick={() =&gt; {

+                   setToolToDelete(null);

+               &gt;
+                 Cancel
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+               &lt;button
+                 onClick={async () =&gt; {

+                     &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+                   &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 )}
+                 {isDeleting ? "Removing..." : "Remove"}
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           {/* Backdrop click to close */}
+           &lt;div
+             className="absolute inset-0 -z-10"
+             onClick={() =&gt; {
+               if (!isDeleting) {
+                 setDeleteToolDialogOpen(false);
+                 setToolToDelete(null);
+               }
+             }}
+           /&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;

+     &lt;/div&gt;
```

```diff
+     const schema: Record&lt;string, any&gt; = {

+       description: prop.description,
+     };
+ 
+     // Handle array type - add items schema
+     if (prop.dataType === "array" &amp;&amp; prop.items) {
+       schema.items = {
+         type: prop.items.dataType,
+         description: prop.items.description,
+       };
+       // If array items are objects, add their properties

+       }
+       // If array items are arrays, recursively add their items

+   };
+ 
+   const addPropertyToItems = (path: string[]) =&gt; {
+     if (!dataFieldItems) return;
+     if (path.length === 0) {
+       setDataFieldItems((prev) =&gt;
+         prev
+           ? {
+               ...prev,
+               properties: [
+                 ...(prev.properties || []),
+                 {
+                   id: crypto.randomUUID(),
+                   dataType: "string",
+                   name: "",
+                   description: "",
+                 },
+               ],
+             }
+           : prev
+       );
+       scrollDataFieldSidebarToBottom();
+       return;
+     }
+     setDataFieldItems((prev) =&gt;
+       prev ? addPropertyToSingleProp(prev, path) : prev
+     );
+     scrollDataFieldSidebarToBottom();
+   };
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;&gt;
+       &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+         {/* Header with Add button */}
+         {dataExtractionFields.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
+           &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between"&gt;
+             &lt;button
+               onClick={() =&gt; {
+                 resetDataFieldForm();
+                 setAddDataFieldSidebarOpen(true);
+               }}
+               className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base font-medium bg-foreground text-background hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer"
+             &gt;
+               Add field
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         )}
+ 
+         {/* Loading State */}
+         {dataExtractionFieldsLoading ? (
+           &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-muted/20"&gt;
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+               &lt;svg
+                 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin"
+                 fill="none"
+                 viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;circle
+                   className="opacity-25"
+                   cx="12"
+                   cy="12"
+                   r="10"
+                   stroke="currentColor"
+                   strokeWidth="4"
+                 &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+                 &lt;path
+                   className="opacity-75"
+                   fill="currentColor"
+                   d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+                 &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+               &lt;/svg&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         ) : dataExtractionFieldsError ? (
+           /* Error State */
+           &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-muted/20"&gt;
+             &lt;p className="text-base text-red-500 mb-2"&gt;
+               {dataExtractionFieldsError}
+             &lt;/p&gt;
+             &lt;button
+               onClick={() =&gt; window.location.reload()}
+               className="text-base text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+             &gt;
+               Retry
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         ) : dataExtractionFields.length === 0 ? (
+           /* Empty State */
+           &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-muted/20"&gt;
+             &lt;div className="w-14 h-14 rounded-xl bg-muted flex items-center justify-center mb-4"&gt;
+               &lt;svg
+                 className="w-7 h-7 text-muted-foreground"
+                 fill="none"
+                 viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                 stroke="currentColor"
+                 strokeWidth={1.5}
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;path
+                   strokeLinecap="round"
+                   strokeLinejoin="round"
+                   d="M3.375 19.5h17.25m-17.25 0a1.125 1.125 0 01-1.125-1.125M3.375 19.5h7.5c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125m-9.75 0V5.625m0 12.75v-1.5c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125m18.375 2.625V5.625m0 12.75c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125m1.125-1.125v-1.5c0-.621-.504-1.125-1.125-1.125m0 3.75h-7.5A1.125 1.125 0 0112 18.375m9.75-12.75c0-.621-.504-1.125-1.125-1.125H3.375c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125m19.5 0v1.5c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125M2.25 5.625v1.5c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125m0 0h17.25m-17.25 0h7.5c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125M3.375 8.25c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v1.5c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125m17.25-3.75h-7.5c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125m8.625-1.125c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v1.5c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125m-17.25 0h7.5m-7.5 0c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v1.5c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125M12 10.875v-1.5m0 1.5c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125M12 10.875c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125m-2.25 0c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125M13.125 12h7.5m-7.5 0c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125M20.625 12c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v1.5c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125m-17.25 0h7.5M12 14.625v-1.5m0 1.5c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125M12 14.625c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125m-2.25 0c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125m0 0v1.5c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125M12 18.375h-7.5"
+                 /&gt;
+               &lt;/svg&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mb-1"&gt;
+               No extraction fields defined
+             &lt;/h3&gt;
+             &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mb-4 text-center max-w-2xl"&gt;
+               Define custom data specifications to extract from conversation
+               transcripts
+             &lt;/p&gt;
+             &lt;button
+               onClick={() =&gt; {
+                 resetDataFieldForm();
+                 setAddDataFieldSidebarOpen(true);
+               }}
+               className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base font-medium border border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+             &gt;
+               Add field
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         ) : (
+           /* Fields List */
+           &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden"&gt;
+             {/* Table Header */}
+             &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-[100px_1fr_2fr_auto] gap-4 px-4 py-3 border-b border-border bg-muted/30"&gt;
+               &lt;div className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                 Type
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                 Name
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                 Description
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div className="w-10"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             {/* Table Body */}
+             {dataExtractionFields.map((field) =&gt; (
+               &lt;div
+                 key={field.uuid}
+                 className="grid grid-cols-[100px_1fr_2fr_auto] gap-4 px-4 py-4 border-b border-border last:border-b-0 hover:bg-muted/20 transition-colors"
+               &gt;
+                 {/* Type Column */}
+                 &lt;div className="flex items-center"&gt;
+                   &lt;span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground capitalize"&gt;
+                     {field.type}
+                   &lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 {/* Name Column */}
+                 &lt;div className="flex items-center"&gt;
+                   &lt;div className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                     {field.name}
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 {/* Description Column */}
+                 &lt;div className="flex items-center"&gt;
+                   &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground line-clamp-2"&gt;
+                     {field.description || "—"}
+                   &lt;/p&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 {/* Delete Button */}
+                 &lt;div className="flex items-center"&gt;
+                   &lt;button
+                     onClick={async () =&gt; {
+                       if (
+                         !confirm(
+                           &#96;Are you sure you want to delete "${field.name}"?&#96;
+                         )
+                       )
+                         return;
+ 
+                       // Remove from local state - will be saved with agent config
+                       setDataExtractionFields((prev) =&gt;
+                         prev.filter((f) =&gt; f.uuid !== field.uuid)
+                       );
+                       // Trigger save to persist the change
+                       setTimeout(() =&gt; saveRef.current(), 0);
+                     }}
+                     className="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-muted-foreground hover:text-red-500 hover:bg-red-500/10 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+                     title="Delete field"
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;svg
+                       className="w-5 h-5"
+                       fill="none"
+                       viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                       stroke="currentColor"
+                       strokeWidth={1.5}
+                     &gt;
+                       &lt;path
+                         strokeLinecap="round"
+                         strokeLinejoin="round"
+                         d="M14.74 9l-.346 9m-4.788 0L9.26 9m9.968-3.21c.342.052.682.107 1.022.166m-1.022-.165L18.16 19.673a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.244 2.077H8.084a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.244-2.077L4.772 5.79m14.456 0a48.108 48.108 0 00-3.478-.397m-12 .562c.34-.059.68-.114 1.022-.165m0 0a48.11 48.11 0 013.478-.397m7.5 0v-.916c0-1.18-.91-2.164-2.09-2.201a51.964 51.964 0 00-3.32 0c-1.18.037-2.09 1.022-2.09 2.201v.916m7.5 0a48.667 48.667 0 00-7.5 0"
+                       /&gt;
+                     &lt;/svg&gt;
+                   &lt;/button&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             ))}
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         )}
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       {/* Add Data Field Sidebar */}
+       {addDataFieldSidebarOpen &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex justify-end"&gt;
+           {/* Backdrop */}
+           &lt;div
+             className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/50"
+             onClick={() =&gt; {
+               resetDataFieldForm();
+               setAddDataFieldSidebarOpen(false);
+             }}
+           /&gt;
+           {/* Sidebar */}
+           &lt;div className="relative w-[40%] min-w-[500px] bg-background border-l border-border flex flex-col h-full shadow-2xl"&gt;
+             {/* Header */}
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4 border-b border-border"&gt;
+               &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+                 &lt;svg
+                   className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground"
+                   fill="none"
+                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                   stroke="currentColor"
+                   strokeWidth={1.5}
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     strokeLinecap="round"
+                     strokeLinejoin="round"
+                     d="M3.375 19.5h17.25m-17.25 0a1.125 1.125 0 01-1.125-1.125M3.375 19.5h7.5c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125m-9.75 0V5.625m0 12.75v-1.5c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125m18.375 2.625V5.625m0 12.75c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125m1.125-1.125v-1.5c0-.621-.504-1.125-1.125-1.125m0 3.75h-7.5A1.125 1.125 0 0112 18.375m9.75-12.75c0-.621-.504-1.125-1.125-1.125H3.375c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125m19.5 0v1.5c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125M2.25 5.625v1.5c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125m0 0h17.25m-17.25 0h7.5c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125M3.375 8.25c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v1.5c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125m17.25-3.75h-7.5c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125m8.625-1.125c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v1.5c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125m-17.25 0h7.5m-7.5 0c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v1.5c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125M12 10.875v-1.5m0 1.5c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125M12 10.875c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125m-2.25 0c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125M13.125 12h7.5m-7.5 0c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125M20.625 12c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125v1.5c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125m-17.25 0h7.5M12 14.625v-1.5m0 1.5c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125M12 14.625c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125m-2.25 0c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125m0 0v1.5c0 .621-.504 1.125-1.125 1.125M12 18.375h-7.5"
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 &lt;h2 className="text-lg font-semibold"&gt;Add data field&lt;/h2&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;button
+                 onClick={() =&gt; {
+                   resetDataFieldForm();
+                   setAddDataFieldSidebarOpen(false);
+                 }}
+                 className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full border border-border hover:bg-muted transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;svg
+                   className="w-5 h-5"
+                   fill="none"
+                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                   stroke="currentColor"
+                   strokeWidth={2}
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     strokeLinecap="round"
+                     strokeLinejoin="round"
+                     d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/svg&gt;
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             {/* Content */}
+             &lt;div
+               ref={dataFieldSidebarContentRef}
+               className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 space-y-6"
+             &gt;
+               {/* Data type and Identifier */}
+               &lt;div className="flex gap-4"&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="w-40"&gt;
+                   &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2"&gt;
+                     Data type
+                   &lt;/label&gt;
+                   &lt;div className="relative"&gt;
+                     &lt;select
+                       value={dataFieldDataType}
+                       onChange={(e) =&gt; {
+                         const newType = e.target.value;
+                         setDataFieldDataType(newType);
+                         // Reset properties/items when type changes
+                         if (newType !== "object") {
+                           setDataFieldProperties([]);
+                         }
+                         if (newType !== "array") {
+                           setDataFieldItems(undefined);
+                         }
+                         // Initialize items for array
+                         if (newType === "array" &amp;&amp; !dataFieldItems) {
+                           setDataFieldItems({
+                             id: crypto.randomUUID(),
+                             dataType: "string",
+                             name: "",
+                             description: "",
+                           });
+                         }
+                       }}
+                       className="w-full h-10 pl-4 pr-10 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent cursor-pointer appearance-none"
+                     &gt;
+                       &lt;option value="boolean"&gt;Boolean&lt;/option&gt;
+                       &lt;option value="integer"&gt;Integer&lt;/option&gt;
+                       &lt;option value="number"&gt;Number&lt;/option&gt;
+                       &lt;option value="string"&gt;String&lt;/option&gt;
+                       &lt;option value="object"&gt;Object&lt;/option&gt;
+                       &lt;option value="array"&gt;Array&lt;/option&gt;
+                     &lt;/select&gt;
+                     &lt;div className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 flex items-center pr-3 pointer-events-none"&gt;
+                       &lt;svg
+                         className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground"
+                         fill="none"
+                         viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                         stroke="currentColor"
+                         strokeWidth={2}
+                       &gt;
+                         &lt;path
+                           strokeLinecap="round"
+                           strokeLinejoin="round"
+                           d="M19.5 8.25l-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5"
+                         /&gt;
+                       &lt;/svg&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="flex-1"&gt;
+                   &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2"&gt;
+                     Name &lt;span className="text-red-500"&gt;*&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;/label&gt;
+                   &lt;input
+                     type="text"
+                     value={dataFieldIdentifier}
+                     onChange={(e) =&gt; setDataFieldIdentifier(e.target.value)}
+                     className={&#96;w-full h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base border bg-background text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent ${
+                       dataFieldValidationAttempted &amp;&amp;
+                       !dataFieldIdentifier.trim()
+                         ? "border-red-500"
+                         : "border-border"
+                     }&#96;}
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               {/* Description */}
+               &lt;div&gt;
+                 &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2"&gt;
+                   Description &lt;span className="text-red-500"&gt;*&lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/label&gt;
+                 &lt;textarea
+                   value={dataFieldDescription}
+                   onChange={(e) =&gt; setDataFieldDescription(e.target.value)}
+                   rows={4}
+                   className={&#96;w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-md text-base border bg-background text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent resize-none ${
+                     dataFieldValidationAttempted &amp;&amp; !dataFieldDescription.trim()
+                       ? "border-red-500"
+                       : "border-border"
+                   }&#96;}
+                   placeholder="This field will be passed to the LLM and should describe in detail how to extract the data from the transcript"
+                 /&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               {/* Properties section for object type */}
+               {dataFieldDataType === "object" &amp;&amp; (
+                 &lt;div&gt;
+                   &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2"&gt;
+                     Properties &lt;span className="text-red-500"&gt;*&lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;/label&gt;
+                   &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl bg-[#1b1b1b] p-4 space-y-4"&gt;
+                     {dataFieldProperties.map((prop) =&gt; (
+                       &lt;DataFieldPropertyCard
+                         key={prop.id}
+                         property={prop}
+                         path={[]}
+                         onUpdate={(path, updates) =&gt; {
+                           if (path.length === 0) {
+                             updateDataFieldProperty(prop.id, updates);
+                           } else {
+                             handleUpdatePropertyAtPath(
+                               [prop.id, ...path],
+                               updates
+                             );
+                           }
+                         }}
+                         onRemove={(parentPath, id) =&gt; {
+                           if (parentPath.length === 0) {
+                             removeDataFieldProperty(id);
+                           } else {
+                             handleRemovePropertyAtPath(
+                               [prop.id, ...parentPath],
+                               id
+                             );
+                           }
+                         }}
+                         onAddProperty={(path) =&gt; {
+                           if (path.length === 0) {
+                             updateDataFieldProperty(prop.id, {
+                               properties: [
+                                 ...(prop.properties || []),
+                                 {
+                                   id: crypto.randomUUID(),
+                                   dataType: "string",
+                                   name: "",
+                                   description: "",
+                                 },
+                               ],
+                             });
+                           } else {
+                             handleAddPropertyAtPath([prop.id, ...path]);
+                           }
+                         }}
+                         onSetItems={(path, items) =&gt; {
+                           if (path.length === 0) {
+                             updateDataFieldProperty(prop.id, { items });
+                           } else {
+                             handleUpdatePropertyAtPath([prop.id, ...path], {
+                               items,
+                             });
+                           }
+                         }}
+                         validationAttempted={dataFieldValidationAttempted}
+                       /&gt;
+                     ))}
+                     &lt;div className="flex justify-center"&gt;
+                       &lt;button
+                         type="button"
+                         onClick={addDataFieldProperty}
+                         className={&#96;h-10 px-6 rounded-md text-sm font-medium border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+                           dataFieldValidationAttempted &amp;&amp;
+                           dataFieldProperties.length === 0
+                             ? "border-red-500"
+                             : "border-border"
+                         }&#96;}
+                       &gt;
+                         Add property
+                       &lt;/button&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               )}
+ 
+               {/* Item section for array type */}
+               {dataFieldDataType === "array" &amp;&amp; (
+                 &lt;div&gt;
+                   &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2"&gt;Item&lt;/label&gt;
+                   &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl bg-[#1b1b1b] p-4 space-y-4"&gt;
+                     &lt;DataFieldPropertyCard
+                       property={
+                         dataFieldItems || {
+                           id: crypto.randomUUID(),
+                           dataType: "string",
+                           name: "",
+                           description: "",
+                         }
+                       }
+                       path={[]}
+                       onUpdate={(path, updates) =&gt; {
+                         updateDataFieldItemsAtPath(path, updates);
+                       }}
+                       onRemove={() =&gt; {}}
+                       onAddProperty={(path) =&gt; {
+                         addPropertyToItems(path);
+                       }}
+                       onSetItems={(path, items) =&gt; {
+                         if (path.length === 0) {
+                           setDataFieldItems((prev) =&gt;
+                             prev ? { ...prev, items } : prev
+                           );
+                         } else {
+                           updateDataFieldItemsAtPath(path, { items });
+                         }
+                       }}
+                       validationAttempted={dataFieldValidationAttempted}
+                       isArrayItem={true}
+                     /&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               )}
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             {/* Footer */}
+             &lt;div className="px-6 py-4 border-t border-border space-y-3"&gt;
+               {createDataFieldError &amp;&amp; (
+                 &lt;p className="text-sm text-red-500"&gt;{createDataFieldError}&lt;/p&gt;
+               )}
+               &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3"&gt;
+                 &lt;button
+                   onClick={() =&gt; {
+                     resetDataFieldForm();
+                     setAddDataFieldSidebarOpen(false);
+                   }}
+                   disabled={isCreatingDataField}
+                   className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base font-medium border border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
+                 &gt;
+                   Cancel
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+                 &lt;button
+                   onClick={() =&gt; {
+                     setDataFieldValidationAttempted(true);
+                     if (!isDataFieldFormValid()) return;
+ 
+                     // Construct the field object using form data
+                     const newField: DataExtractionFieldData = {
+                       uuid: crypto.randomUUID(),
+                       type: dataFieldDataType,
+                       name: dataFieldIdentifier.trim(),
+                       description: dataFieldDescription.trim(),
+                       agent_id: agentUuid,
+                       created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
+                       updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
+                     };
+ 
+                     // Add the new field to the list
+                     setDataExtractionFields((prev) =&gt; [...prev, newField]);
+ 
+                     // Reset and close
+                     resetDataFieldForm();
+                     setAddDataFieldSidebarOpen(false);
+ 
+                     // Trigger save to persist the change
+                     setTimeout(() =&gt; saveRef.current(), 0);
+                   }}
+                   disabled={isCreatingDataField}
+                   className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base font-medium bg-white text-gray-900 hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2"
+                 &gt;
+                   {isCreatingDataField ? (
+                     &lt;&gt;
+                       &lt;svg
+                         className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin"
+                         fill="none"
+                         viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                       &gt;
+                         &lt;circle
+                           className="opacity-25"
+                           cx="12"
+                           cy="12"
+                           r="10"
+                           stroke="currentColor"
+                           strokeWidth="4"
+                         &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+                         &lt;path
+                           className="opacity-75"
+                           fill="currentColor"
+                           d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+                         &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+                       &lt;/svg&gt;
+                       Creating...
+                     &lt;/&gt;
+                   ) : (
+                     "Add field"
+                   )}
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       )}
+     &lt;/&gt;
+   );
+ }
+ 
```

```diff
- 
- type TabType =
-   | "agent"
-   | "tools"
-   | "evaluation"
-   | "data-extraction"
-   | "settings";
- 
- const validTabs: TabType[] = [
-   "agent",
-   "tools",
-   "evaluation",
-   "data-extraction",
-   "settings",
- ];
- 
- export function AgentDetail({ agentUuid, onHeaderUpdate }: AgentDetailProps) {
-   const searchParams = useSearchParams();
-   const router = useRouter();
- 
-   // Get initial tab from URL or default to "agent"
-   const getInitialTab = (): TabType =&gt; {
-     const tabParam = searchParams.get("tab");
-     if (tabParam &amp;&amp; validTabs.includes(tabParam as TabType)) {
-       return tabParam as TabType;
-     }
-     return "agent";
-   };
- 
-   const [agent, setAgent] = useState&lt;AgentData | null&gt;(null);
-   const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
-   const [error, setError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);
-   const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState&lt;TabType&gt;(getInitialTab);
- 
-   // Update URL when tab changes
-   const handleTabChange = (tab: TabType) =&gt; {
-     setActiveTab(tab);
-     const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString());
-     params.set("tab", tab);
-     router.push(&#96;?${params.toString()}&#96;, { scroll: false });
-   };
-   const [systemPrompt, setSystemPrompt] = useState("");
-   const [sttProvider, setSttProvider] = useState&lt;string&gt;("google");
-   const [ttsProvider, setTtsProvider] = useState&lt;string&gt;("google");
-   const [selectedLLM, setSelectedLLM] = useState&lt;LLMModel | null&gt;({
-     id: "google/gemini-3-flash-preview",
-     name: "Gemini 3 Flash Preview",
-   });
-   const [llmModalOpen, setLlmModalOpen] = useState(false);
-   const [llmSearchQuery, setLlmSearchQuery] = useState("");
-   const [endConversationEnabled, setEndConversationEnabled] = useState(true);
-   const [agentSpeaksFirst, setAgentSpeaksFirst] = useState(false);
-   const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
-   const [showSaveToast, setShowSaveToast] = useState(false);
-   const saveRef = useRef&lt;() =&gt; void&gt;(() =&gt; {});
-   const isSavingRef = useRef(false);
-   const [toolsSearchQuery, setToolsSearchQuery] = useState("");
-   const [addToolDialogOpen, setAddToolDialogOpen] = useState(false);
-   const [addToolDialogSearchQuery, setAddToolDialogSearchQuery] = useState("");
-   const [selectedToolsForAdd, setSelectedToolsForAdd] = useState&lt;Set&lt;string&gt;&gt;(
-     new Set()
-   );
-   // Tools linked to this agent
-   const [agentTools, setAgentTools] = useState&lt;ToolData[]&gt;([]);
-   const [agentToolsLoading, setAgentToolsLoading] = useState(false);
-   const [agentToolsError, setAgentToolsError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);
-   // All available tools (for the add tool dialog)
-   const [allTools, setAllTools] = useState&lt;ToolData[]&gt;([]);
-   const [allToolsLoading, setAllToolsLoading] = useState(false);
-   const [allToolsError, setAllToolsError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);
-   // Delete tool confirmation dialog
-   const [deleteToolDialogOpen, setDeleteToolDialogOpen] = useState(false);
-   const [toolToDelete, setToolToDelete] = useState&lt;ToolData | null&gt;(null);
-   const [isDeleting, setIsDeleting] = useState(false);
- 
-   // Data extraction sidebar state
-   const [addDataFieldSidebarOpen, setAddDataFieldSidebarOpen] = useState(false);
-   const [dataFieldDataType, setDataFieldDataType] = useState("string");
-   const [dataFieldIdentifier, setDataFieldIdentifier] = useState("");
-   const [dataFieldDescription, setDataFieldDescription] = useState("");
-   const [isCreatingDataField, setIsCreatingDataField] = useState(false);
-   const [createDataFieldError, setCreateDataFieldError] = useState&lt;
-     string | null
-   &gt;(null);
-   const [dataFieldValidationAttempted, setDataFieldValidationAttempted] =
-     useState(false);
- 
-   // State for data field properties
-   const [dataFieldProperties, setDataFieldProperties] = useState&lt;
-     DataFieldProperty[]
-   &gt;([]);
-   const [dataFieldItems, setDataFieldItems] = useState&lt;
-     DataFieldProperty | undefined
-   &gt;(undefined);
-   const dataFieldSidebarContentRef = useRef&lt;HTMLDivElement&gt;(null);
- 
-   // Scroll to bottom when adding properties
-   const scrollDataFieldSidebarToBottom = () =&gt; {
-     if (dataFieldSidebarContentRef.current) {
-       setTimeout(() =&gt; {
-         dataFieldSidebarContentRef.current?.scrollTo({
-           top: dataFieldSidebarContentRef.current.scrollHeight,
-           behavior: "smooth",
-         });
-       }, 50);
-     }
-   };
- 
-   // Data extraction fields list state
-   type DataExtractionFieldData = {
-     uuid: string;
-     type: string;
-     name: string;
-     description: string;
-     agent_id: string;
-     created_at: string;
-     updated_at: string;
-   };
-   const [dataExtractionFields, setDataExtractionFields] = useState&lt;
-     DataExtractionFieldData[]
-   &gt;([]);
-   const [dataExtractionFieldsLoading, setDataExtractionFieldsLoading] =
-     useState(false);
-   const [dataExtractionFieldsError, setDataExtractionFieldsError] = useState&lt;
-     string | null
-   &gt;(null);
- 
-   // Reset data field form
-   const resetDataFieldForm = () =&gt; {
-     setDataFieldDataType("string");
-     setDataFieldIdentifier("");
-     setDataFieldDescription("");
-     setDataFieldProperties([]);
-     setDataFieldItems(undefined);
-     setCreateDataFieldError(null);
-     setDataFieldValidationAttempted(false);
-   };
- 
-   // Helper function to convert DataFieldProperty to JSON Schema format
-   const dataFieldPropertyToJsonSchema = (
-     prop: DataFieldProperty
-   ): Record&lt;string, any&gt; =&gt; {
-     const schema: Record&lt;string, any&gt; = {
-       type: prop.dataType,
-       description: prop.description,
-     };
- 
-     // Handle array type - add items schema
-     if (prop.dataType === "array" &amp;&amp; prop.items) {
-       schema.items = {
-         type: prop.items.dataType,
-         description: prop.items.description,
-       };
-       // If array items are objects, add their properties
-       if (
-         prop.items.dataType === "object" &amp;&amp;
-         prop.items.properties &amp;&amp;
-         prop.items.properties.length &gt; 0
-       ) {
-         schema.items.properties = {};
-         prop.items.properties.forEach((p) =&gt; {
-           schema.items.properties[p.name] = dataFieldPropertyToJsonSchema(p);
-         });
-       }
-       // If array items are arrays, recursively add their items
-       if (prop.items.dataType === "array" &amp;&amp; prop.items.items) {
-         schema.items.items = dataFieldPropertyToJsonSchema(prop.items.items);
-       }
-     }
- 
-     // Handle object type - add properties schema
-     if (
-       prop.dataType === "object" &amp;&amp;
-       prop.properties &amp;&amp;
-       prop.properties.length &gt; 0
-     ) {
-       schema.properties = {};
-       prop.properties.forEach((p) =&gt; {
-         schema.properties[p.name] = dataFieldPropertyToJsonSchema(p);
-       });
-     }
- 
-     return schema;
-   };
- 
-   // Build the full data field config for API
-   const buildDataFieldConfig = (): Record&lt;string, any&gt; =&gt; {
-     const config: Record&lt;string, any&gt; = {
-       type: dataFieldDataType,
-       description: dataFieldDescription.trim(),
-     };
- 
-     // Add properties for object type
-     if (dataFieldDataType === "object" &amp;&amp; dataFieldProperties.length &gt; 0) {
-       config.properties = {};
-       dataFieldProperties.forEach((prop) =&gt; {
-         config.properties[prop.name] = dataFieldPropertyToJsonSchema(prop);
-       });
-     }
- 
-     // Add items for array type
-     if (dataFieldDataType === "array" &amp;&amp; dataFieldItems) {
-       config.items = {
-         type: dataFieldItems.dataType,
-         description: dataFieldItems.description,
-       };
-       // If array items are objects, add their properties
-       if (
-         dataFieldItems.dataType === "object" &amp;&amp;
-         dataFieldItems.properties &amp;&amp;
-         dataFieldItems.properties.length &gt; 0
-       ) {
-         config.items.properties = {};
-         dataFieldItems.properties.forEach((prop) =&gt; {
-           config.items.properties[prop.name] =
-             dataFieldPropertyToJsonSchema(prop);
-         });
-       }
-       // If array items are arrays, recursively add their items
-       if (dataFieldItems.dataType === "array" &amp;&amp; dataFieldItems.items) {
-         config.items.items = dataFieldPropertyToJsonSchema(
-           dataFieldItems.items
-         );
-       }
-     }
- 
-     return config;
-   };
- 
-   // Recursive validation helper for data field properties
-   const hasInvalidDataFieldProperties = (
-     props: DataFieldProperty[]
-   ): boolean =&gt; {
-     for (const p of props) {
-       if (!p.name.trim() || !p.description.trim()) {
-         return true;
-       }
-       // Object type must have at least one property
-       if (p.dataType === "object") {
-         if (!p.properties || p.properties.length === 0) {
-           return true;
-         }
-         if (hasInvalidDataFieldProperties(p.properties)) {
-           return true;
-         }
-       }
-       if (p.dataType === "array" &amp;&amp; p.items) {
-         if (hasInvalidSingleDataFieldProperty(p.items)) {
-           return true;
-         }
-       }
-     }
-     return false;
-   };
- 
-   // Validation helper for a single property (used for array items)
-   const hasInvalidSingleDataFieldProperty = (
-     prop: DataFieldProperty
-   ): boolean =&gt; {
-     if (!prop.description.trim()) {
-       return true;
-     }
-     // Object type must have at least one property
-     if (prop.dataType === "object") {
-       if (!prop.properties || prop.properties.length === 0) {
-         return true;
-       }
-       if (hasInvalidDataFieldProperties(prop.properties)) {
-         return true;
-       }
-     }
-     if (prop.dataType === "array" &amp;&amp; prop.items) {
-       if (hasInvalidSingleDataFieldProperty(prop.items)) {
-         return true;
-       }
-     }
-     return false;
-   };
- 
-   // Check if the entire data field form is valid
-   const isDataFieldFormValid = (): boolean =&gt; {
-     if (!dataFieldIdentifier.trim() || !dataFieldDescription.trim()) {
-       return false;
-     }
-     // Object type must have at least one property
-     if (dataFieldDataType === "object") {
-       if (dataFieldProperties.length === 0) {
-         return false;
-       }
-       if (hasInvalidDataFieldProperties(dataFieldProperties)) {
-         return false;
-       }
-     }
-     if (dataFieldDataType === "array" &amp;&amp; dataFieldItems) {
-       if (hasInvalidSingleDataFieldProperty(dataFieldItems)) {
-         return false;
-       }
-     }
-     return true;
-   };
- 
-   // Helper functions for data field properties (recursive)
-   const addDataFieldProperty = () =&gt; {
-     setDataFieldValidationAttempted(false);
-     setDataFieldProperties((prev) =&gt; [
-       ...prev,
-       {
-         id: crypto.randomUUID(),
-         dataType: "string",
-         name: "",
-         description: "",
-       },
-     ]);
-     scrollDataFieldSidebarToBottom();
-   };
- 
-   const updateDataFieldProperty = (
-     id: string,
-     updates: Partial&lt;DataFieldProperty&gt;
-   ) =&gt; {
-     setDataFieldProperties((prev) =&gt;
-       prev.map((p) =&gt; (p.id === id ? { ...p, ...updates } : p))
-     );
-   };
- 
-   const removeDataFieldProperty = (id: string) =&gt; {
-     setDataFieldProperties((prev) =&gt; prev.filter((p) =&gt; p.id !== id));
-   };
- 
-   // Recursive property update at any depth
-   const updatePropertyAtPath = (
-     props: DataFieldProperty[],
-     path: string[],
-     updates: Partial&lt;DataFieldProperty&gt;
-   ): DataFieldProperty[] =&gt; {
-     if (path.length === 0) return props;
-     const [currentId, ...restPath] = path;
-     return props.map((p) =&gt; {
-       if (p.id !== currentId) return p;
-       if (restPath.length === 0) {
-         return { ...p, ...updates };
-       }
-       if (restPath[0] === "__items__") {
-         const currentItems = p.items || {
-           id: crypto.randomUUID(),
-           dataType: "string",
-           name: "",
-           description: "",
-         };
-         if (restPath.length === 1) {
-           return { ...p, items: { ...currentItems, ...updates } };
-         }
-         return {
-           ...p,
-           items: updateSinglePropertyAtPath(
-             currentItems,
-             restPath.slice(1),
-             updates
-           ),
-         };
-       }
-       return {
-         ...p,
-         properties: updatePropertyAtPath(p.properties || [], restPath, updates),
-       };
-     });
-   };
- 
-   const updateSinglePropertyAtPath = (
-     prop: DataFieldProperty,
-     path: string[],
-     updates: Partial&lt;DataFieldProperty&gt;
-   ): DataFieldProperty =&gt; {
-     if (path.length === 0) {
-       return { ...prop, ...updates };
-     }
-     const [currentSegment, ...restPath] = path;
-     if (currentSegment === "__items__") {
-       const currentItems = prop.items || {
-         id: crypto.randomUUID(),
-         dataType: "string",
-         name: "",
-         description: "",
-       };
-       if (restPath.length === 0) {
-         return { ...prop, items: { ...currentItems, ...updates } };
-       }
-       return {
-         ...prop,
-         items: updateSinglePropertyAtPath(currentItems, restPath, updates),
-       };
-     }
-     return {
-       ...prop,
-       properties: updatePropertyAtPath(prop.properties || [], path, updates),
-     };
-   };
- 
-   const addPropertyAtPath = (
-     props: DataFieldProperty[],
-     path: string[]
-   ): DataFieldProperty[] =&gt; {
-     if (path.length === 0) return props;
-     const [currentId, ...restPath] = path;
-     return props.map((p) =&gt; {
-       if (p.id !== currentId) return p;
-       if (restPath.length === 0) {
-         return {
-           ...p,
-           properties: [
-             ...(p.properties || []),
-             {
-               id: crypto.randomUUID(),
-               dataType: "string",
-               name: "",
-               description: "",
-             },
-           ],
-         };
-       }
-       if (restPath[0] === "__items__" &amp;&amp; p.items) {
-         return {
-           ...p,
-           items: addPropertyToSingleProp(p.items, restPath.slice(1)),
-         };
-       }
-       return {
-         ...p,
-         properties: addPropertyAtPath(p.properties || [], restPath),
-       };
-     });
-   };
- 
-   const addPropertyToSingleProp = (
-     prop: DataFieldProperty,
-     path: string[]
-   ): DataFieldProperty =&gt; {
-     if (path.length === 0) {
-       return {
-         ...prop,
-         properties: [
-           ...(prop.properties || []),
-           {
-             id: crypto.randomUUID(),
-             dataType: "string",
-             name: "",
-             description: "",
-           },
-         ],
-       };
-     }
-     if (path[0] === "__items__" &amp;&amp; prop.items) {
-       return {
-         ...prop,
-         items: addPropertyToSingleProp(prop.items, path.slice(1)),
-       };
-     }
-     return {
-       ...prop,
-       properties: addPropertyAtPath(prop.properties || [], path),
-     };
-   };
- 
-   const removePropertyAtPath = (
-     props: DataFieldProperty[],
-     path: string[],
-     idToRemove: string
-   ): DataFieldProperty[] =&gt; {
-     if (path.length === 0) {
-       return props.filter((p) =&gt; p.id !== idToRemove);
-     }
-     const [currentId, ...restPath] = path;
-     return props.map((p) =&gt; {
-       if (p.id !== currentId) return p;
-       if (restPath[0] === "__items__" &amp;&amp; p.items) {
-         return {
-           ...p,
-           items: removePropertyFromSingleProp(
-             p.items,
-             restPath.slice(1),
-             idToRemove
-           ),
-         };
-       }
-       if (restPath.length === 0) {
-         return {
-           ...p,
-           properties: (p.properties || []).filter(
-             (prop) =&gt; prop.id !== idToRemove
-           ),
-         };
-       }
-       return {
-         ...p,
-         properties: removePropertyAtPath(
-           p.properties || [],
-           restPath,
-           idToRemove
-         ),
-       };
-     });
-   };
- 
-   const removePropertyFromSingleProp = (
-     prop: DataFieldProperty,
-     path: string[],
-     idToRemove: string
-   ): DataFieldProperty =&gt; {
-     if (path.length === 0) {
-       return {
-         ...prop,
-         properties: (prop.properties || []).filter((p) =&gt; p.id !== idToRemove),
-       };
-     }
-     if (path[0] === "__items__" &amp;&amp; prop.items) {
-       return {
-         ...prop,
-         items: removePropertyFromSingleProp(
-           prop.items,
-           path.slice(1),
-           idToRemove
-         ),
-       };
-     }
-     return {
-       ...prop,
-       properties: removePropertyAtPath(prop.properties || [], path, idToRemove),
-     };
-   };
- 
-   // Handlers for nested properties
-   const handleUpdatePropertyAtPath = (
-     path: string[],
-     updates: Partial&lt;DataFieldProperty&gt;
-   ) =&gt; {
-     setDataFieldProperties((prev) =&gt; updatePropertyAtPath(prev, path, updates));
-   };
- 
-   const handleAddPropertyAtPath = (path: string[]) =&gt; {
-     setDataFieldProperties((prev) =&gt; addPropertyAtPath(prev, path));
-     scrollDataFieldSidebarToBottom();
-   };
- 
-   const handleRemovePropertyAtPath = (parentPath: string[], id: string) =&gt; {
-     setDataFieldProperties((prev) =&gt;
-       removePropertyAtPath(prev, parentPath, id)
-     );
-   };
- 
-   // Items handlers for top-level array
-   const updateDataFieldItemsAtPath = (
-     path: string[],
-     updates: Partial&lt;DataFieldProperty&gt;
-   ) =&gt; {
-     if (!dataFieldItems) return;
-     if (path.length === 0) {
-       setDataFieldItems((prev) =&gt; (prev ? { ...prev, ...updates } : prev));
-       return;
-     }
-     setDataFieldItems((prev) =&gt;
-       prev ? updateSinglePropertyAtPath(prev, path, updates) : prev
-     );
-   };
- 
-   const addPropertyToItems = (path: string[]) =&gt; {
-     if (!dataFieldItems) return;
-     if (path.length === 0) {
-       setDataFieldItems((prev) =&gt;
-         prev
-           ? {
-               ...prev,
-               properties: [
-                 ...(prev.properties || []),
-                 {
-                   id: crypto.randomUUID(),
-                   dataType: "string",
-                   name: "",
-                   description: "",
-                 },
-               ],
-             }
-           : prev
-       );
-       scrollDataFieldSidebarToBottom();
-       return;
-     }
-     setDataFieldItems((prev) =&gt;
-       prev ? addPropertyToSingleProp(prev, path) : prev
-     );
-     scrollDataFieldSidebarToBottom();
-   };
- 
-   const removePropertyFromItems = (parentPath: string[], id: string) =&gt; {
-     if (!dataFieldItems) return;
-     if (parentPath.length === 0) {
-       setDataFieldItems((prev) =&gt;
-         prev
-           ? {
-               ...prev,
-               properties: (prev.properties || []).filter((p) =&gt; p.id !== id),
-             }
-           : prev
-       );
-       return;
-     }
-     setDataFieldItems((prev) =&gt;
-       prev ? removePropertyFromSingleProp(prev, parentPath, id) : prev
-     );
-   };
- 
-   // Evaluation criteria sidebar state
-   const [addCriteriaSidebarOpen, setAddCriteriaSidebarOpen] = useState(false);
-   const [criteriaName, setCriteriaName] = useState("");
-   const [criteriaInstructions, setCriteriaInstructions] = useState("");
-   const [isCreatingCriteria, setIsCreatingCriteria] = useState(false);
-   const [createCriteriaError, setCreateCriteriaError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(
-     null
-   );
- 
-   // Evaluation criteria list state
-   type EvaluationCriteriaData = {
-     uuid: string;
-     name: string;
-     description: string;
-     agent_id: string;
-     created_at: string;
-     updated_at: string;
-   };
-   const [evaluationCriteria, setEvaluationCriteria] = useState&lt;
-     EvaluationCriteriaData[]
-   &gt;([]);
-   const [evaluationCriteriaLoading, setEvaluationCriteriaLoading] =
-     useState(false);
-   const [evaluationCriteriaError, setEvaluationCriteriaError] = useState&lt;
-     string | null
-   &gt;(null);
- 
-   // Reset criteria form
-   const resetCriteriaForm = () =&gt; {
-     setCriteriaName("");
-     setCriteriaInstructions("");
-     setCreateCriteriaError(null);
-   };
- 
-   useEffect(() =&gt; {
-     const fetchAgent = async () =&gt; {
-       try {
-         setIsLoading(true);
-         setError(null);
-         const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
-         if (!backendUrl) {
-           throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
-         }
- 
-         const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/agents/${agentUuid}&#96;, {
-           method: "GET",
-           headers: {
-             accept: "application/json",
-             "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
-           },
-         });
- 
-         if (!response.ok) {
-           throw new Error("Failed to fetch agent");
-         }
- 
-         const data: AgentData = await response.json();
-         setAgent(data);
- 
-         // Initialize form fields from agent config if available
-         if (data.config) {
-           if (data.config.system_prompt) {
-             setSystemPrompt(data.config.system_prompt);
-           }
-           if (data.config.stt?.provider) {
-             setSttProvider(data.config.stt.provider);
-           }
-           if (data.config.tts?.provider) {
-             setTtsProvider(data.config.tts.provider);
-           }
-           if (data.config.llm?.model) {
-             // Find the matching LLM model from the providers list
-             const modelId = data.config.llm.model;
-             let foundModel: LLMModel | null = null;
-             for (const provider of llmProviders) {
-               const model = provider.models.find((m) =&gt; m.id === modelId);
-               if (model) {
-                 foundModel = model;
-                 break;
-               }
-             }
-             if (foundModel) {
-               setSelectedLLM(foundModel);
-             } else {
-               // If model not found in list, create a basic entry
-               setSelectedLLM({ id: modelId, name: modelId });
-             }
-           }
-           if (data.config.settings?.agent_speaks_first !== undefined) {
-             setAgentSpeaksFirst(data.config.settings.agent_speaks_first);
-           }
-           if (data.config.system_tools?.end_call !== undefined) {
-             setEndConversationEnabled(data.config.system_tools.end_call);
-           }
-           // Load data extraction fields from config
-           if (data.config.data_extraction_fields) {
-             const fields = data.config.data_extraction_fields.map(
-               (field: any) =&gt; ({
-                 uuid: field.uuid || crypto.randomUUID(),
-                 type: field.type,
-                 name: field.name,
-                 description: field.description,
-                 agent_id: agentUuid,
-                 created_at: field.created_at || new Date().toISOString(),
-                 updated_at: field.updated_at || new Date().toISOString(),
-               })
-             );
-             setDataExtractionFields(fields);
-           }
-         }
-       } catch (err) {
-         console.error("Error fetching agent:", err);
-         setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to load agent");
-       } finally {
-         setIsLoading(false);
-       }
-     };
- 
-     if (agentUuid) {
-       fetchAgent();
-     }
- 
-     // Cleanup: clear header when component unmounts
-     return () =&gt; {
-       if (onHeaderUpdate) {
-         onHeaderUpdate(null);
-       }
-     };
-   }, [agentUuid, onHeaderUpdate]);
- 
-   // Fetch tools linked to this agent
-   useEffect(() =&gt; {
-     const fetchAgentTools = async () =&gt; {
-       if (!agentUuid) return;
- 
-       try {
-         setAgentToolsLoading(true);
-         setAgentToolsError(null);
-         const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
-         if (!backendUrl) {
-           throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
-         }
- 
-         const response = await fetch(
-           &#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tools/agent/${agentUuid}/tools&#96;,
-           {
-             method: "GET",
-             headers: {
-               accept: "application/json",
-               "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
-             },
-           }
-         );
- 
-         if (!response.ok) {
-           throw new Error("Failed to fetch agent tools");
-         }
- 
-         const data: ToolData[] = await response.json();
-         setAgentTools(data);
-       } catch (err) {
-         console.error("Error fetching agent tools:", err);
-         setAgentToolsError(
-           err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to load agent tools"
-         );
-       } finally {
-         setAgentToolsLoading(false);
-       }
-     };
- 
-     fetchAgentTools();
-   }, [agentUuid]);
- 
-   // Fetch all available tools (for the add tool dialog)
-   useEffect(() =&gt; {
-     const fetchAllTools = async () =&gt; {
-       try {
-         setAllToolsLoading(true);
-         setAllToolsError(null);
-         const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
-         if (!backendUrl) {
-           throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
-         }
- 
-         const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/tools&#96;, {
-           method: "GET",
-           headers: {
-             accept: "application/json",
-             "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
-           },
-         });
- 
-         if (!response.ok) {
-           throw new Error("Failed to fetch tools");
-         }
- 
-         const data: ToolData[] = await response.json();
-         setAllTools(data);
-       } catch (err) {
-         console.error("Error fetching tools:", err);
-         setAllToolsError(
-           err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to load tools"
-         );
-       } finally {
-         setAllToolsLoading(false);
-       }
-     };
- 
-     fetchAllTools();
-   }, []);
- 
-   // Fetch evaluation criteria for this agent
-   useEffect(() =&gt; {
-     const fetchEvaluationCriteria = async () =&gt; {
-       if (!agentUuid) return;
- 
-       try {
-         setEvaluationCriteriaLoading(true);
-         setEvaluationCriteriaError(null);
-         const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
-         if (!backendUrl) {
-           throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
-         }
- 
-         const response = await fetch(
-           &#96;${backendUrl}/evaluation-criteria/agent/${agentUuid}&#96;,
-           {
-             method: "GET",
-             headers: {
-               accept: "application/json",
-               "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
-             },
-           }
-         );
- 
-         if (!response.ok) {
-           throw new Error("Failed to fetch evaluation criteria");
-         }
- 
-         const data: EvaluationCriteriaData[] = await response.json();
-         setEvaluationCriteria(data);
-       } catch (err) {
-         console.error("Error fetching evaluation criteria:", err);
-         setEvaluationCriteriaError(
-           err instanceof Error
-             ? err.message
-             : "Failed to load evaluation criteria"
-         );

- 
-   // Update save function ref when relevant state changes
-   useEffect(() =&gt; {
-     saveRef.current = async () =&gt; {
-       if (!agent) return;
- 
-       try {
-         setIsSaving(true);
-         isSavingRef.current = true;
-         const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
-         if (!backendUrl) {
-           throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
-         }
- 
-         const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/agents/${agentUuid}&#96;, {
-           method: "PUT",
-           headers: {
-             accept: "application/json",
-             "Content-Type": "application/json",
-             "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
-           },
-           body: JSON.stringify({
-             name: agent.name,
-             config: {
-               system_prompt: systemPrompt,
-               stt: { provider: sttProvider },
-               tts: { provider: ttsProvider },
-               llm: { model: selectedLLM?.id || "" },
-               settings: { agent_speaks_first: agentSpeaksFirst },
-               system_tools: { end_call: endConversationEnabled },
-               data_extraction_fields: dataExtractionFields.map((field) =&gt; ({
-                 name: field.name,
-                 type: field.type,
-                 description: field.description,
-               })),
-             },
-           }),
-         });
- 
-         if (!response.ok) {
-           throw new Error("Failed to save agent");
-         }
- 
-         // Show success toast
-         setShowSaveToast(true);
-       } catch (err) {
-         console.error("Error saving agent:", err);
-         alert(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to save agent");
-       } finally {
-         setIsSaving(false);
-         isSavingRef.current = false;
-       }
-     };
-   }, [
-     agent,
-     agentUuid,
-     systemPrompt,
-     sttProvider,
-     ttsProvider,
-     selectedLLM,
-     agentSpeaksFirst,
-     endConversationEnabled,
-     dataExtractionFields,
-   ]);
- 
-   // Update header when isSaving changes
-   useEffect(() =&gt; {
-     if (agent &amp;&amp; onHeaderUpdate) {
-       onHeaderUpdate(
-         &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between w-full"&gt;
-           &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
-             &lt;Link
-               href="/agents"
-               className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors cursor-pointer"
-               title="Back to agents"
-             &gt;
-               &lt;svg
-                 className="w-5 h-5"
-                 fill="none"
-                 viewBox="0 0 24 24"
-                 stroke="currentColor"
-                 strokeWidth={2}
-               &gt;
-                 &lt;path
-                   strokeLinecap="round"
-                   strokeLinejoin="round"
-                   d="M15.75 19.5L8.25 12l7.5-7.5"
-                 /&gt;
-               &lt;/svg&gt;
-             &lt;/Link&gt;
-             &lt;h1 className="text-lg font-semibold"&gt;{agent.name}&lt;/h1&gt;
-           &lt;/div&gt;
-           &lt;button
-             onClick={() =&gt; saveRef.current()}
-             disabled={isSaving}
-             className="h-8 px-6 rounded-md text-sm font-medium bg-foreground text-background hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-70 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2"
-           &gt;
-             {isSaving &amp;&amp; (
-               &lt;svg
-                 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin"
-                 fill="none"
-                 viewBox="0 0 24 24"
-               &gt;
-                 &lt;circle
-                   className="opacity-25"
-                   cx="12"
-                   cy="12"
-                   r="10"
-                   stroke="currentColor"
-                   strokeWidth="4"
-                 &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
-                 &lt;path
-                   className="opacity-75"
-                   fill="currentColor"
-                   d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
-                 &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
-               &lt;/svg&gt;
-             )}
-             {isSaving ? "" : "Save"}
-           &lt;/button&gt;
-         &lt;/div&gt;
-       );
-     }
-   }, [agent, isSaving, onHeaderUpdate]);
- 
-   // Auto-dismiss toast after 3 seconds

-     if (showSaveToast) {
-       const timer = setTimeout(() =&gt; {
-         setShowSaveToast(false);
-       }, 3000);
-       return () =&gt; clearTimeout(timer);
-     }
-   }, [showSaveToast]);
- 
-   // Recursive component for data field properties
-   if (isLoading) {
-     return (
-       &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center h-64"&gt;
-         &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
-           &lt;svg className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
-             &lt;circle
-               className="opacity-25"
-               cx="12"
-               cy="12"
-               r="10"
-               stroke="currentColor"
-               strokeWidth="4"
-             &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
-             &lt;path
-               className="opacity-75"
-               fill="currentColor"
-               d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
-             &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
-           &lt;/svg&gt;
-           &lt;span className="text-base text-muted-foreground"&gt;
-             Loading agent...
-           &lt;/span&gt;
-         &lt;/div&gt;
-       &lt;/div&gt;
-     );
-   }
- 
-   if (error) {
-     return (
-       &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center h-64"&gt;
-         &lt;div className="text-center"&gt;
-           &lt;p className="text-base text-red-500 mb-2"&gt;{error}&lt;/p&gt;
-           &lt;button
-             onClick={() =&gt; window.location.reload()}
-             className="text-base text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer"
-           &gt;
-             Retry
-           &lt;/button&gt;
-         &lt;/div&gt;
-       &lt;/div&gt;
-     );
-   }
- 
-   if (!agent) {
-     return (

-

-                   The system prompt is used to determine the persona of the

-                         .includes(toolsSearchQuery.toLowerCase()))

-                       &lt;path

-                         strokeLinejoin="round"
```
