```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,258 @@
- 
+ "use client";
+ 
+ import React, { useState } from "react";
+ 
+ type ToolData = {
+   uuid: string;
+   name: string;
+   config: Record&lt;string, any&gt;;
+   created_at: string;
+   updated_at: string;
+ };
+ 
+ type AddToolDialogProps = {
+   isOpen: boolean;
+   onClose: () =&gt; void;
+   agentUuid: string;
+   agentTools: ToolData[];
+   allTools: ToolData[];
+   allToolsLoading: boolean;
+   onToolsAdded: (tools: ToolData[]) =&gt; void;
+ };
+ 
+ export function AddToolDialog({
+   isOpen,
+   onClose,
+   agentUuid,
+   agentTools,
+   allTools,
+   allToolsLoading,
+   onToolsAdded,
+ }: AddToolDialogProps) {
+   const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("");
+   const [selectedTools, setSelectedTools] = useState&lt;Set&lt;string&gt;&gt;(new Set());
+ 
+   if (!isOpen) return null;
+ 
+   const handleClose = () =&gt; {
+     setSearchQuery("");
+     setSelectedTools(new Set());
+     onClose();
+   };
+ 
+   const handleAdd = async () =&gt; {
+     try {
+       const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+       if (!backendUrl) {
+         throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
+       }
+ 
+       const toolUuidsToAdd = Array.from(selectedTools);
+ 
+       const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tools&#96;, {
+         method: "POST",
+         headers: {
+           accept: "application/json",
+           "Content-Type": "application/json",
+           "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+         },
+         body: JSON.stringify({
+           agent_uuid: agentUuid,
+           tool_uuids: toolUuidsToAdd,
+         }),
+       });
+ 
+       if (!response.ok) {
+         throw new Error("Failed to add tools to agent");
+       }
+ 
+       // Get added tools data
+       const addedTools = allTools.filter((tool) =&gt;
+         toolUuidsToAdd.includes(tool.uuid)
+       );
+       onToolsAdded(addedTools);
+ 
+       // Close dialog and reset state
+       handleClose();
+     } catch (err) {
+       console.error("Error adding tools to agent:", err);
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   // Filter out tools already added to the agent
+   const agentToolUuids = new Set(agentTools.map((t) =&gt; t.uuid));
+   const baseAvailableTools = allTools.filter(
+     (tool) =&gt; !agentToolUuids.has(tool.uuid)
+   );
+ 
+   // Filter by search query
+   const availableTools = baseAvailableTools.filter(
+     (tool) =&gt;
+       tool.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
+       (tool.config?.description &amp;&amp;
+         tool.config?.description
+           .toLowerCase()
+           .includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()))
+   );
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50"&gt;
+       &lt;div className="bg-background border border-border rounded-xl w-[40%] min-w-[500px] max-h-[80vh] flex flex-col shadow-2xl"&gt;
+         {/* Dialog Header */}
+         &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 border-b border-border"&gt;
+           &lt;h2 className="text-base font-semibold"&gt;Add Tools&lt;/h2&gt;
+           &lt;button
+             onClick={handleClose}
+             className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+           &gt;
+             &lt;svg
+               className="w-5 h-5"
+               fill="none"
+               viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+               stroke="currentColor"
+               strokeWidth={2}
+             &gt;
+               &lt;path
+                 strokeLinecap="round"
+                 strokeLinejoin="round"
+                 d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"
+               /&gt;
+             &lt;/svg&gt;
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         {/* Tools List */}
+         &lt;div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4"&gt;
+           {allToolsLoading ? (
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center py-8"&gt;
+               &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+                 &lt;svg
+                   className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin"
+                   fill="none"
+                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;circle
+                     className="opacity-25"
+                     cx="12"
+                     cy="12"
+                     r="10"
+                     stroke="currentColor"
+                     strokeWidth="4"
+                   &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     className="opacity-75"
+                     fill="currentColor"
+                     d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+                   &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+                 &lt;/svg&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           ) : baseAvailableTools.length === 0 ? (
+             &lt;div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-8 text-center"&gt;
+               &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                 All available tools have been added to this agent
+               &lt;/p&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           ) : (
+             &lt;&gt;
+               {/* Search Input */}
+               &lt;div className="mb-4"&gt;
+                 &lt;input
+                   type="text"
+                   value={searchQuery}
+                   onChange={(e) =&gt; setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
+                   placeholder="Search tools"
+                   className="w-full h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent"
+                 /&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               {availableTools.length === 0 ? (
+                 &lt;div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-8 text-center"&gt;
+                   &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                     No tools match your search
+                   &lt;/p&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               ) : (
+                 availableTools.map((tool) =&gt; {
+                   const isSelected = selectedTools.has(tool.uuid);
+                   return (
+                     &lt;button
+                       key={tool.uuid}
+                       onClick={() =&gt; {
+                         setSelectedTools((prev) =&gt; {
+                           const newSet = new Set(prev);
+                           if (newSet.has(tool.uuid)) {
+                             newSet.delete(tool.uuid);
+                           } else {
+                             newSet.add(tool.uuid);
+                           }
+                           return newSet;
+                         });
+                       }}
+                       className={&#96;w-full p-4 rounded-lg border transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left mb-3 last:mb-0 ${
+                         isSelected
+                           ? "border-foreground bg-muted/50"
+                           : "border-border bg-muted/30 hover:bg-muted/50"
+                       }&#96;}
+                     &gt;
+                       &lt;div className="flex items-start gap-3"&gt;
+                         {/* Checkbox */}
+                         &lt;div
+                           className={&#96;w-5 h-5 rounded border flex-shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center mt-0.5 transition-colors ${
+                             isSelected
+                               ? "bg-foreground border-foreground"
+                               : "border-border"
+                           }&#96;}
+                         &gt;
+                           {isSelected &amp;&amp; (
+                             &lt;svg
+                               className="w-3 h-3 text-background"
+                               fill="none"
+                               viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                               stroke="currentColor"
+                               strokeWidth={3}
+                             &gt;
+                               &lt;path
+                                 strokeLinecap="round"
+                                 strokeLinejoin="round"
+                                 d="M4.5 12.75l6 6 9-13.5"
+                               /&gt;
+                             &lt;/svg&gt;
+                           )}
+                         &lt;/div&gt;
+                         &lt;div&gt;
+                           &lt;h4 className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                             {tool.name}
+                           &lt;/h4&gt;
+                           &lt;p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1 line-clamp-2"&gt;
+                             {tool.config?.description}
+                           &lt;/p&gt;
+                         &lt;/div&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;/button&gt;
+                   );
+                 })
+               )}
+             &lt;/&gt;
+           )}
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         {/* Footer - only shown when tools are selected */}
+         {selectedTools.size &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
+           &lt;div className="px-4 py-3 border-t border-border flex items-center justify-end"&gt;
+             &lt;button
+               onClick={handleAdd}
+               className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium bg-white text-gray-900 hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer"
+             &gt;
+               Add ({selectedTools.size})
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         )}
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       {/* Backdrop click to close */}
+       &lt;div className="absolute inset-0 -z-10" onClick={handleClose} /&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   );
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 125, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,125 @@
- 
+ "use client";
+ 
+ import React, { useState } from "react";
+ 
+ type ToolData = {
+   uuid: string;
+   name: string;
+   config: Record&lt;string, any&gt;;
+   created_at: string;
+   updated_at: string;
+ };
+ 
+ type DeleteToolDialogProps = {
+   isOpen: boolean;
+   onClose: () =&gt; void;
+   agentUuid: string;
+   tool: ToolData | null;
+   onToolDeleted: (toolUuid: string) =&gt; void;
+ };
+ 
+ export function DeleteToolDialog({
+   isOpen,
+   onClose,
+   agentUuid,
+   tool,
+   onToolDeleted,
+ }: DeleteToolDialogProps) {
+   const [isDeleting, setIsDeleting] = useState(false);
+ 
+   if (!isOpen || !tool) return null;
+ 
+   const handleClose = () =&gt; {
+     if (!isDeleting) {
+       onClose();
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   const handleDelete = async () =&gt; {
+     try {
+       setIsDeleting(true);
+       const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+       if (!backendUrl) {
+         throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
+       }
+ 
+       const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tools&#96;, {
+         method: "DELETE",
+         headers: {
+           accept: "application/json",
+           "Content-Type": "application/json",
+           "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+         },
+         body: JSON.stringify({
+           agent_uuid: agentUuid,
+           tool_uuid: tool.uuid,
+         }),
+       });
+ 
+       if (!response.ok) {
+         throw new Error("Failed to remove tool from agent");
+       }
+ 
+       onToolDeleted(tool.uuid);
+       onClose();
+     } catch (err) {
+       console.error("Error removing tool from agent:", err);
+     } finally {
+       setIsDeleting(false);
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50"&gt;
+       &lt;div className="bg-background border border-border rounded-xl w-full max-w-md p-6 shadow-2xl"&gt;
+         &lt;h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mb-2"&gt;
+           Remove tool
+         &lt;/h2&gt;
+         &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mb-6"&gt;
+           Are you sure you want to remove this tool from this agent?
+         &lt;/p&gt;
+         &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3"&gt;
+           &lt;button
+             onClick={handleClose}
+             disabled={isDeleting}
+             className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium border border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
+           &gt;
+             Cancel
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;button
+             onClick={handleDelete}
+             disabled={isDeleting}
+             className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium bg-red-800 text-white hover:bg-red-900 transition-colors cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2"
+           &gt;
+             {isDeleting &amp;&amp; (
+               &lt;svg
+                 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin"
+                 fill="none"
+                 viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;circle
+                   className="opacity-25"
+                   cx="12"
+                   cy="12"
+                   r="10"
+                   stroke="currentColor"
+                   strokeWidth="4"
+                 &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+                 &lt;path
+                   className="opacity-75"
+                   fill="currentColor"
+                   d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+                 &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+               &lt;/svg&gt;
+             )}
+             {isDeleting ? "Removing..." : "Remove"}
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       {/* Backdrop click to close */}
+       &lt;div className="absolute inset-0 -z-10" onClick={handleClose} /&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   );
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

+ "use client";
+ 
+ import React from "react";
+ import { INBUILT_TOOLS, getInbuiltToolIcon } from "@/constants/inbuilt-tools";
+ 
+ type InbuiltToolsPanelProps = {
+   endConversationEnabled: boolean;
+   setEndConversationEnabled: (value: boolean) =&gt; void;
+ };
+ 
+ export function InbuiltToolsPanel({
+   endConversationEnabled,
+   setEndConversationEnabled,
+ }: InbuiltToolsPanelProps) {
+   return (
+     &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
+       &lt;div&gt;
+         &lt;h3 className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;In-built tools&lt;/h3&gt;
+         &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mt-0.5"&gt;
+           Allow the agent to perform built-in actions.
+         &lt;/p&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden"&gt;
+         {/* Active tools counter */}
+         &lt;div className="px-4 py-3 bg-muted/30 border-b border-border"&gt;
+           &lt;span className="text-base text-foreground"&gt;
+             {endConversationEnabled ? "1 active tool" : "0 active tools"}
+           &lt;/span&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         {/* In-built tools list */}
+         {INBUILT_TOOLS.map((tool) =&gt; (
+           &lt;div
+             key={tool.id}
+             className="px-4 py-3 flex items-center justify-between border-b border-border last:border-b-0"
+           &gt;
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+               &lt;svg
+                 className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground"
+                 fill="none"
+                 viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                 stroke="currentColor"
+                 strokeWidth={1.5}
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;path
+                   strokeLinecap="round"
+                   strokeLinejoin="round"
+                   d={getInbuiltToolIcon(tool.icon)}
+                 /&gt;
+               &lt;/svg&gt;
+               &lt;span className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                 {tool.name}
+               &lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             {/* Toggle Switch */}
+             &lt;button
+               onClick={() =&gt; {
+                 if (tool.id === "end_call") {
+                   setEndConversationEnabled(!endConversationEnabled);
+                 }
+               }}
+               className={&#96;relative w-11 h-6 rounded-full transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+                 tool.id === "end_call" &amp;&amp; endConversationEnabled
+                   ? "bg-foreground"
+                   : "bg-muted"
+               }&#96;}
+             &gt;
+               &lt;div
+                 className={&#96;absolute top-0.5 w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-background transition-transform ${
+                   tool.id === "end_call" &amp;&amp; endConversationEnabled
+                     ? "translate-x-5"
+                     : "translate-x-0.5"
+                 }&#96;}
+               /&gt;
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         ))}
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   );
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

- export { llmProviders };
- export type { LLMModel, LLMProvider };
- 
- type AgentTabContentProps = {
-   systemPrompt: string;
-   setSystemPrompt: (value: string) =&gt; void;
-   sttProvider: string;
-   setSttProvider: (value: string) =&gt; void;
-   ttsProvider: string;
-   setTtsProvider: (value: string) =&gt; void;
-   selectedLLM: LLMModel | null;
-   setSelectedLLM: (value: LLMModel | null) =&gt; void;
- };
- 
- export function AgentTabContent({
-   systemPrompt,
-   setSystemPrompt,
-   sttProvider,
-   setSttProvider,
-   ttsProvider,
-   setTtsProvider,
-   selectedLLM,
-   setSelectedLLM,
- }: AgentTabContentProps) {
-   const [llmModalOpen, setLlmModalOpen] = React.useState(false);
-   const [llmSearchQuery, setLlmSearchQuery] = React.useState("");
- 
-   return (
-     &lt;&gt;
-       &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-8 h-[calc(100vh-200px)]"&gt;
-         {/* Left Column: System Prompt */}
-         &lt;div className="flex flex-col"&gt;
-           &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2"&gt;
-             &lt;label className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
-               System prompt
-             &lt;/label&gt;
-             &lt;div className="relative group"&gt;
-               &lt;button className="text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer"&gt;
-                 &lt;svg
-                   className="w-4 h-4"
-                   fill="none"
-                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
-                   stroke="currentColor"
-                   strokeWidth={2}
-                 &gt;
-                   &lt;path
-                     strokeLinecap="round"
-                     strokeLinejoin="round"
-                     d="M9.879 7.519c1.171-1.025 3.071-1.025 4.242 0 1.172 1.025 1.172 2.687 0 3.712-.203.179-.43.326-.67.442-.745.361-1.45.999-1.45 1.827v.75M21 12a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0zm-9 5.25h.008v.008H12v-.008z"
-                   /&gt;
-                 &lt;/svg&gt;
-               &lt;/button&gt;
-               &lt;div className="absolute left-0 top-full mt-2 w-72 p-3 bg-white text-gray-900 text-base leading-relaxed rounded-lg shadow-lg opacity-0 invisible group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:visible transition-all duration-200 z-50"&gt;
-                 The system prompt is used to determine the persona of the agent
-                 and the context of the conversation.
-               &lt;/div&gt;
-             &lt;/div&gt;
-           &lt;/div&gt;
-           &lt;div className="bg-muted/30 rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-border flex-1"&gt;
-             &lt;textarea
-               value={systemPrompt}
-               onChange={(e) =&gt; setSystemPrompt(e.target.value)}
-               className="w-full h-full px-4 py-3 text-base bg-muted/30 text-foreground focus:outline-none resize-none"
-             /&gt;
-           &lt;/div&gt;
-         &lt;/div&gt;
- 
-         {/* Right Column: STT, TTS, LLM */}
-         &lt;div className="space-y-8"&gt;
-           {/* Speech To Text */}
-           &lt;div&gt;
-             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2"&gt;
-               &lt;div&gt;
-                 &lt;h3 className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
-                   Speech To Text
-                 &lt;/h3&gt;
-                 &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mt-0.5"&gt;
-                   Select the STT provider for the agent
-                 &lt;/p&gt;
-               &lt;/div&gt;
-             &lt;/div&gt;
-             &lt;div className="mt-3"&gt;
-               &lt;div className="relative"&gt;
-                 &lt;select
-                   value={sttProvider}
-                   onChange={(e) =&gt; setSttProvider(e.target.value)}
-                   className="w-full h-10 px-4 pr-10 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent cursor-pointer appearance-none"
-                 &gt;
-                   {sttProviders.map((provider) =&gt; (
-                     &lt;option key={provider.value} value={provider.value}&gt;
-                       {provider.label}
-                     &lt;/option&gt;
-                   ))}
-                 &lt;/select&gt;
-                 &lt;div className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 flex items-center pr-3 pointer-events-none"&gt;
-                   &lt;svg
-                     className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground"
-                     fill="none"
-                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
-                     stroke="currentColor"
-                     strokeWidth={2}
-                   &gt;
-                     &lt;path
-                       strokeLinecap="round"
-                       strokeLinejoin="round"
-                       d="M19.5 8.25l-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5"
-                     /&gt;
-                   &lt;/svg&gt;
-                 &lt;/div&gt;
-               &lt;/div&gt;
-             &lt;/div&gt;
-           &lt;/div&gt;
- 
-           {/* Text To Speech */}
-           &lt;div&gt;
-             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2"&gt;
-               &lt;div&gt;
-                 &lt;h3 className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
-                   Text To Speech
-                 &lt;/h3&gt;
-                 &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mt-0.5"&gt;
-                   Select the TTS provider for the agent
-                 &lt;/p&gt;
-               &lt;/div&gt;
-             &lt;/div&gt;
-             &lt;div className="mt-3"&gt;
-               &lt;div className="relative"&gt;
-                 &lt;select
-                   value={ttsProvider}
-                   onChange={(e) =&gt; setTtsProvider(e.target.value)}
-                   className="w-full h-10 px-4 pr-10 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent cursor-pointer appearance-none"
-                 &gt;
-                   {ttsProviders.map((provider) =&gt; (
-                     &lt;option key={provider.value} value={provider.value}&gt;
-                       {provider.label}
-                     &lt;/option&gt;
-                   ))}
-                 &lt;/select&gt;
-                 &lt;div className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 flex items-center pr-3 pointer-events-none"&gt;
-                   &lt;svg
-                     className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground"
-                     fill="none"
-                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
-                     stroke="currentColor"
-                     strokeWidth={2}
-                   &gt;
-                     &lt;path
-                       strokeLinecap="round"
-                       strokeLinejoin="round"
-                       d="M19.5 8.25l-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5"
-                     /&gt;
-                   &lt;/svg&gt;
-                 &lt;/div&gt;
-               &lt;/div&gt;
-             &lt;/div&gt;
-           &lt;/div&gt;
- 
-           {/* LLM */}
-           &lt;div&gt;
-             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2"&gt;
-               &lt;div&gt;
-                 &lt;h3 className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;LLM&lt;/h3&gt;
-                 &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mt-0.5"&gt;
-                   Select which provider and model to use for the LLM
-                 &lt;/p&gt;
-               &lt;/div&gt;
-             &lt;/div&gt;
-             &lt;div className="mt-3"&gt;
-               &lt;button
-                 onClick={() =&gt; setLlmModalOpen(true)}
-                 className="w-full h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 flex items-center justify-between cursor-pointer transition-colors"
-               &gt;
-                 &lt;span
-                   className={
-                     selectedLLM ? "text-foreground" : "text-muted-foreground"
-                   }
-                 &gt;
-                   {selectedLLM ? selectedLLM.name : "Select LLM model"}
-                 &lt;/span&gt;
-                 &lt;svg
-                   className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground"
-                   fill="none"
-                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
-                   stroke="currentColor"
-                   strokeWidth={2}
-                 &gt;
-                   &lt;path
-                     strokeLinecap="round"
-                     strokeLinejoin="round"
-                     d="M19.5 8.25l-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5"
-                   /&gt;
-                 &lt;/svg&gt;
-               &lt;/button&gt;
-             &lt;/div&gt;
-           &lt;/div&gt;
-         &lt;/div&gt;
-       &lt;/div&gt;
- 
-       {/* LLM Selection Modal */}
-       {llmModalOpen &amp;&amp; (
-         &lt;div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-start justify-center pt-16 bg-black/50"&gt;
-           &lt;div className="bg-background border border-border rounded-xl w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[80vh] flex flex-col shadow-2xl"&gt;
-             {/* Modal Header */}
-             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 border-b border-border"&gt;
-               &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
-                 &lt;button

+ import React, { useState } from "react";
+ import {
+   sttProviders,
+   ttsProviders,
+   llmProviders,
+   type LLMModel,
+ } from "./constants/providers";
+ import { LLMSelectorModal } from "./LLMSelectorModal";
+ 
+ export { llmProviders };
+ export type { LLMModel };
+ 
+ type AgentTabContentProps = {
+   systemPrompt: string;
+   setSystemPrompt: (value: string) =&gt; void;
+   sttProvider: string;
+   setSttProvider: (value: string) =&gt; void;
+   ttsProvider: string;
+   setTtsProvider: (value: string) =&gt; void;
+   selectedLLM: LLMModel | null;
+   setSelectedLLM: (value: LLMModel | null) =&gt; void;
+ };
+ 
+ export function AgentTabContent({
+   systemPrompt,
+   setSystemPrompt,
+   sttProvider,
+   setSttProvider,
+   ttsProvider,
+   setTtsProvider,
+   selectedLLM,
+   setSelectedLLM,
+ }: AgentTabContentProps) {
+   const [llmModalOpen, setLlmModalOpen] = useState(false);
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;&gt;
+       &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-8 h-[calc(100vh-200px)]"&gt;
+         {/* Left Column: System Prompt */}
+         &lt;div className="flex flex-col"&gt;
+           &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2"&gt;
+             &lt;label className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+               System prompt
+             &lt;/label&gt;
+             &lt;div className="relative group"&gt;
+               &lt;button className="text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer"&gt;
+                 &lt;svg
+                   className="w-4 h-4"
+                   fill="none"
+                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                   stroke="currentColor"
+                   strokeWidth={2}
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     strokeLinecap="round"
+                     strokeLinejoin="round"
+                     d="M9.879 7.519c1.171-1.025 3.071-1.025 4.242 0 1.172 1.025 1.172 2.687 0 3.712-.203.179-.43.326-.67.442-.745.361-1.45.999-1.45 1.827v.75M21 12a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0zm-9 5.25h.008v.008H12v-.008z"
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/svg&gt;
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+               &lt;div className="absolute left-0 top-full mt-2 w-72 p-3 bg-white text-gray-900 text-base leading-relaxed rounded-lg shadow-lg opacity-0 invisible group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:visible transition-all duration-200 z-50"&gt;
+                 The system prompt is used to determine the persona of the agent
+                 and the context of the conversation.
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div className="bg-muted/30 rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-border flex-1"&gt;
+             &lt;textarea
+               value={systemPrompt}
+               onChange={(e) =&gt; setSystemPrompt(e.target.value)}
+               className="w-full h-full px-4 py-3 text-base bg-muted/30 text-foreground focus:outline-none resize-none"
+             /&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         {/* Right Column: STT, TTS, LLM */}
+         &lt;div className="space-y-8"&gt;
+           {/* Speech To Text */}
+           &lt;div&gt;
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2"&gt;
+               &lt;div&gt;
+                 &lt;h3 className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                   Speech To Text
+                 &lt;/h3&gt;
+                 &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mt-0.5"&gt;
+                   Select the STT provider for the agent
+                 &lt;/p&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div className="mt-3"&gt;
+               &lt;div className="relative"&gt;
+                 &lt;select
+                   value={sttProvider}
+                   onChange={(e) =&gt; setSttProvider(e.target.value)}
+                   className="w-full h-10 px-4 pr-10 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent cursor-pointer appearance-none"
+                 &gt;
+                   {sttProviders.map((provider) =&gt; (
+                     &lt;option key={provider.value} value={provider.value}&gt;
+                       {provider.label}
+                     &lt;/option&gt;
+                   ))}
+                 &lt;/select&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 flex items-center pr-3 pointer-events-none"&gt;
+                   &lt;svg
+                     className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground"
+                     fill="none"
+                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                     stroke="currentColor"
+                     strokeWidth={2}
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;path

+             &lt;/div&gt;

+ 
+           {/* Text To Speech */}
+           &lt;div&gt;
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2"&gt;
+               &lt;div&gt;
+                 &lt;h3 className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                   Text To Speech
+                 &lt;/h3&gt;
+                 &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mt-0.5"&gt;
+                   Select the TTS provider for the agent
+                 &lt;/p&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div className="mt-3"&gt;
+               &lt;div className="relative"&gt;
+                 &lt;select
+                   value={ttsProvider}

+                   className="w-full h-10 px-4 pr-10 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent cursor-pointer appearance-none"
+                 &gt;
+                   {ttsProviders.map((provider) =&gt; (
+                     &lt;option key={provider.value} value={provider.value}&gt;
+                       {provider.label}
+                     &lt;/option&gt;
+                   ))}
+                 &lt;/select&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 flex items-center pr-3 pointer-events-none"&gt;
+                   &lt;svg
+                     className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground"
+                     fill="none"
+                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                     stroke="currentColor"
+                     strokeWidth={2}
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;path
+                       strokeLinecap="round"
+                       strokeLinejoin="round"
+                       d="M19.5 8.25l-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5"
+                     /&gt;
+                   &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           {/* LLM */}
+           &lt;div&gt;
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2"&gt;
+               &lt;div&gt;
+                 &lt;h3 className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;LLM&lt;/h3&gt;
+                 &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mt-0.5"&gt;
+                   Select which provider and model to use for the LLM
+                 &lt;/p&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div className="mt-3"&gt;
+               &lt;button
+                 onClick={() =&gt; setLlmModalOpen(true)}
+                 className="w-full h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 flex items-center justify-between cursor-pointer transition-colors"
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;span
+                   className={
+                     selectedLLM ? "text-foreground" : "text-muted-foreground"
+                   }
+                 &gt;
+                   {selectedLLM ? selectedLLM.name : "Select LLM model"}
+                 &lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;svg
+                   className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground"
+                   fill="none"
+                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                   stroke="currentColor"
+                   strokeWidth={2}
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     strokeLinecap="round"
+                     strokeLinejoin="round"
+                     d="M19.5 8.25l-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5"
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/svg&gt;
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       {/* LLM Selection Modal */}
+       &lt;LLMSelectorModal
+         isOpen={llmModalOpen}
+         onClose={() =&gt; setLlmModalOpen(false)}
+         selectedLLM={selectedLLM}
+         onSelect={setSelectedLLM}
+       /&gt;
+     &lt;/&gt;
+   );
+ }
+

-         &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
-           &lt;div&gt;
-             &lt;h3 className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
-               In-built tools
-             &lt;/h3&gt;
-             &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mt-0.5"&gt;
-               Allow the agent to perform built-in actions.
-             &lt;/p&gt;
-           &lt;/div&gt;
- 
-           &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden"&gt;
-             {/* Active tools counter */}
-             &lt;div className="px-4 py-3 bg-muted/30 border-b border-border"&gt;
-               &lt;span className="text-base text-foreground"&gt;
-                 {endConversationEnabled ? "1 active tool" : "0 active tools"}
-               &lt;/span&gt;
-             &lt;/div&gt;
- 
-             {/* In-built tools list */}
-             {INBUILT_TOOLS.map((tool) =&gt; (
-               &lt;div
-                 key={tool.id}
-                 className="px-4 py-3 flex items-center justify-between border-b border-border last:border-b-0"
-               &gt;
-                 &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
-                   &lt;svg
-                     className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground"
-                     fill="none"
-                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
-                     stroke="currentColor"
-                     strokeWidth={1.5}
-                   &gt;
-                     &lt;path
-                       strokeLinecap="round"
-                       strokeLinejoin="round"
-                       d={getInbuiltToolIcon(tool.icon)}
-                     /&gt;
-                   &lt;/svg&gt;
-                   &lt;span className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
-                     {tool.name}
-                   &lt;/span&gt;
-                 &lt;/div&gt;
-                 {/* Toggle Switch */}
-                 &lt;button
-                   onClick={() =&gt; {
-                     if (tool.id === "end_call") {
-                       setEndConversationEnabled(!endConversationEnabled);
-                     }
-                   }}
-                   className={&#96;relative w-11 h-6 rounded-full transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
-                     tool.id === "end_call" &amp;&amp; endConversationEnabled
-                       ? "bg-foreground"
-                       : "bg-muted"
-                   }&#96;}
-                 &gt;
-                   &lt;div
-                     className={&#96;absolute top-0.5 w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-background transition-transform ${
-                       tool.id === "end_call" &amp;&amp; endConversationEnabled
-                         ? "translate-x-5"
-                         : "translate-x-0.5"
-                     }&#96;}
-                   /&gt;
-                 &lt;/button&gt;
-               &lt;/div&gt;
-             ))}
-           &lt;/div&gt;
-         &lt;/div&gt;
-       &lt;/div&gt;
- 
-       {/* Add Tool Dialog */}
-       {addToolDialogOpen &amp;&amp; (
-         &lt;div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50"&gt;
-           &lt;div className="bg-background border border-border rounded-xl w-[40%] min-w-[500px] max-h-[80vh] flex flex-col shadow-2xl"&gt;
-             {/* Dialog Header */}
-             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 border-b border-border"&gt;
-               &lt;h2 className="text-base font-semibold"&gt;Add Tools&lt;/h2&gt;
-               &lt;button
-                 onClick={() =&gt; {
-                   setAddToolDialogOpen(false);
-                   setAddToolDialogSearchQuery("");
-                   setSelectedToolsForAdd(new Set());
-                 }}
-                 className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors cursor-pointer"
-               &gt;
-                 &lt;svg
-                   className="w-5 h-5"
-                   fill="none"
-                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
-                   stroke="currentColor"
-                   strokeWidth={2}
-                 &gt;
-                   &lt;path
-                     strokeLinecap="round"
-                     strokeLinejoin="round"
-                     d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"
-                   /&gt;
-                 &lt;/svg&gt;
-               &lt;/button&gt;
-             &lt;/div&gt;
- 
-             {/* Tools List */}
-             &lt;div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4"&gt;
-               {allToolsLoading ? (
-                 &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center py-8"&gt;
-                   &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
-                     &lt;svg
-                       className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin"
-                       fill="none"
-                       viewBox="0 0 24 24"
-                     &gt;
-                       &lt;circle
-                         className="opacity-25"
-                         cx="12"
-                         cy="12"
-                         r="10"
-                         stroke="currentColor"
-                         strokeWidth="4"
-                       &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
-                       &lt;path
-                         className="opacity-75"
-                         fill="currentColor"
-                         d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
-                       &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
-                     &lt;/svg&gt;
-                   &lt;/div&gt;
-                 &lt;/div&gt;
-               ) : (
-                 (() =&gt; {
-                   // Filter out tools already added to the agent
-                   const agentToolUuids = new Set(agentTools.map((t) =&gt; t.uuid));
-                   const baseAvailableTools = allTools.filter(
-                     (tool) =&gt; !agentToolUuids.has(tool.uuid)
-                   );
- 
-                   // If no tools are available at all (all added to agent), show message without search
-                   if (baseAvailableTools.length === 0) {
-                     return (
-                       &lt;div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-8 text-center"&gt;
-                         &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground"&gt;
-                           All available tools have been added to this agent
-                         &lt;/p&gt;
-                       &lt;/div&gt;
-                     );
-                   }
- 
-                   // Filter by search query
-                   const availableTools = baseAvailableTools.filter(
-                     (tool) =&gt;
-                       tool.name
-                         .toLowerCase()
-                         .includes(addToolDialogSearchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
-                       (tool.config?.description &amp;&amp;
-                         tool.config?.description
-                           .toLowerCase()
-                           .includes(addToolDialogSearchQuery.toLowerCase()))
-                   );
- 
-                   return (
-                     &lt;&gt;
-                       {/* Search Input - only shown when there are tools to search */}
-                       &lt;div className="mb-4"&gt;
-                         &lt;input
-                           type="text"
-                           value={addToolDialogSearchQuery}
-                           onChange={(e) =&gt;
-                             setAddToolDialogSearchQuery(e.target.value)
-                           }
-                           placeholder="Search tools"
-                           className="w-full h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent"
-                         /&gt;
-                       &lt;/div&gt;
- 
-                       {availableTools.length === 0 ? (
-                         &lt;div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-8 text-center"&gt;
-                           &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground"&gt;
-                             No tools match your search
-                           &lt;/p&gt;
-                         &lt;/div&gt;
-                       ) : (
-                         availableTools.map((tool) =&gt; {
-                           const isSelected = selectedToolsForAdd.has(tool.uuid);
-                           return (
-                             &lt;button
-                               key={tool.uuid}
-                               onClick={() =&gt; {
-                                 // Toggle tool selection
-                                 setSelectedToolsForAdd((prev) =&gt; {
-                                   const newSet = new Set(prev);
-                                   if (newSet.has(tool.uuid)) {
-                                     newSet.delete(tool.uuid);
-                                   } else {
-                                     newSet.add(tool.uuid);
-                                   }
-                                   return newSet;
-                                 });
-                               }}
-                               className={&#96;w-full p-4 rounded-lg border transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left mb-3 last:mb-0 ${
-                                 isSelected
-                                   ? "border-foreground bg-muted/50"
-                                   : "border-border bg-muted/30 hover:bg-muted/50"
-                               }&#96;}
-                             &gt;
-                               &lt;div className="flex items-start gap-3"&gt;
-                                 {/* Checkbox */}
-                                 &lt;div
-                                   className={&#96;w-5 h-5 rounded border flex-shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center mt-0.5 transition-colors ${
-                                     isSelected
-                                       ? "bg-foreground border-foreground"
-                                       : "border-border"
-                                   }&#96;}
-                                 &gt;
-                                   {isSelected &amp;&amp; (
-                                     &lt;svg
-                                       className="w-3 h-3 text-background"
-                                       fill="none"
-                                       viewBox="0 0 24 24"
-                                       stroke="currentColor"
-                                       strokeWidth={3}
-                                     &gt;
-                                       &lt;path
-                                         strokeLinecap="round"
-                                         strokeLinejoin="round"
-                                         d="M4.5 12.75l6 6 9-13.5"
-                                       /&gt;
-                                     &lt;/svg&gt;
-                                   )}
-                                 &lt;/div&gt;
-                                 &lt;div&gt;
-                                   &lt;h4 className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
-                                     {tool.name}
-                                   &lt;/h4&gt;
-                                   &lt;p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1 line-clamp-2"&gt;
-                                     {tool.config?.description}
-                                   &lt;/p&gt;
-                                 &lt;/div&gt;
-                               &lt;/div&gt;
-                             &lt;/button&gt;
-                           );
-                         })
-                       )}
-                     &lt;/&gt;
-                   );
-                 })()
-               )}
-             &lt;/div&gt;
- 
-             {/* Footer - only shown when tools are selected */}
-             {selectedToolsForAdd.size &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
-               &lt;div className="px-4 py-3 border-t border-border flex items-center justify-end"&gt;
-                 &lt;button
-                   onClick={async () =&gt; {
-                     try {
-                       const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
-                       if (!backendUrl) {
-                         throw new Error(
-                           "BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set"
-                         );
-                       }
- 
-                       const toolUuidsToAdd = Array.from(selectedToolsForAdd);
- 
-                       const response = await fetch(
-                         &#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tools&#96;,
-                         {
-                           method: "POST",
-                           headers: {
-                             accept: "application/json",
-                             "Content-Type": "application/json",
-                             "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
-                           },
-                           body: JSON.stringify({
-                             agent_uuid: agentUuid,
-                             tool_uuids: toolUuidsToAdd,
-                           }),
-                         }
-                       );
- 
-                       if (!response.ok) {
-                         throw new Error("Failed to add tools to agent");
-                       }
- 
-                       // Add tools to local state
-                       const addedTools = allTools.filter((tool) =&gt;
-                         toolUuidsToAdd.includes(tool.uuid)
-                       );
-                       setAgentTools((prev) =&gt; [...prev, ...addedTools]);
- 
-                       // Close dialog and reset state
-                       setAddToolDialogOpen(false);
-                       setAddToolDialogSearchQuery("");
-                       setSelectedToolsForAdd(new Set());
-                     } catch (err) {
-                       console.error("Error adding tools to agent:", err);
-                     }
-                   }}
-                   className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium bg-white text-gray-900 hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer"
-                 &gt;
-                   Add ({selectedToolsForAdd.size})
-                 &lt;/button&gt;
-               &lt;/div&gt;
-             )}
-           &lt;/div&gt;
- 
-           {/* Backdrop click to close */}
-           &lt;div
-             className="absolute inset-0 -z-10"
-             onClick={() =&gt; {
-               setAddToolDialogOpen(false);
-               setAddToolDialogSearchQuery("");
-               setSelectedToolsForAdd(new Set());
-             }}
-           /&gt;
-         &lt;/div&gt;
-       )}
- 
-       {/* Delete Tool Confirmation Dialog */}
-       {deleteToolDialogOpen &amp;&amp; toolToDelete &amp;&amp; (
-         &lt;div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50"&gt;
-           &lt;div className="bg-background border border-border rounded-xl w-full max-w-md p-6 shadow-2xl"&gt;
-             &lt;h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mb-2"&gt;
-               Remove tool
-             &lt;/h2&gt;
-             &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mb-6"&gt;
-               Are you sure you want to remove this tool from this agent?
-             &lt;/p&gt;
-             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3"&gt;
-               &lt;button
-                 onClick={() =&gt; {
-                   setDeleteToolDialogOpen(false);
-                   setToolToDelete(null);
-                 }}
-                 disabled={isDeleting}
-                 className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium border border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
-               &gt;
-                 Cancel
-               &lt;/button&gt;
-               &lt;button
-                 onClick={async () =&gt; {
-                   try {
-                     setIsDeleting(true);
-                     const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
-                     if (!backendUrl) {
-                       throw new Error(
-                         "BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set"
-                       );
-                     }
- 
-                     const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tools&#96;, {
-                       method: "DELETE",
-                       headers: {
-                         accept: "application/json",
-                         "Content-Type": "application/json",
-                         "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
-                       },
-                       body: JSON.stringify({
-                         agent_uuid: agentUuid,
-                         tool_uuid: toolToDelete.uuid,
-                       }),
-                     });
- 
-                     if (!response.ok) {
-                       throw new Error("Failed to remove tool from agent");
-                     }
- 
-                     // Remove tool from local state
-                     setAgentTools((prev) =&gt;
-                       prev.filter((t) =&gt; t.uuid !== toolToDelete.uuid)
-                     );
- 
-                     // Close dialog
-                     setDeleteToolDialogOpen(false);
-                     setToolToDelete(null);
-                   } catch (err) {
-                     console.error("Error removing tool from agent:", err);
-                   } finally {
-                     setIsDeleting(false);
-                   }
-                 }}
-                 disabled={isDeleting}
-                 className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium bg-red-800 text-white hover:bg-red-900 transition-colors cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2"
-               &gt;
-                 {isDeleting &amp;&amp; (
-                   &lt;svg
-                     className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin"
-                     fill="none"
-                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
-                   &gt;
-                     &lt;circle
-                       className="opacity-25"
-                       cx="12"
-                       cy="12"
-                       r="10"
-                       stroke="currentColor"
-                       strokeWidth="4"
-                     &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
-                     &lt;path
-                       className="opacity-75"
-                       fill="currentColor"
-                       d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
-                     &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
-                   &lt;/svg&gt;
-                 )}
-                 {isDeleting ? "Removing..." : "Remove"}
-               &lt;/button&gt;
-             &lt;/div&gt;
-           &lt;/div&gt;
- 
-           {/* Backdrop click to close */}
-           &lt;div
-             className="absolute inset-0 -z-10"
-             onClick={() =&gt; {
-               if (!isDeleting) {
-                 setDeleteToolDialogOpen(false);
-                 setToolToDelete(null);
-               }
-             }}
-           /&gt;
-         &lt;/div&gt;
-       )}
-     &lt;/div&gt;
-   );
- }
- 
+ import { AddToolDialog } from "./AddToolDialog";
+ import { DeleteToolDialog } from "./DeleteToolDialog";
+ import { InbuiltToolsPanel } from "./InbuiltToolsPanel";
+ 
+ type ToolData = {
+   uuid: string;
+   name: string;
+   config: Record&lt;string, any&gt;;
+   created_at: string;
+   updated_at: string;
+ };
+ 
+ type ToolsTabContentProps = {
+   agentUuid: string;
+   agentTools: ToolData[];
+   setAgentTools: React.Dispatch&lt;React.SetStateAction&lt;ToolData[]&gt;&gt;;
+   agentToolsLoading: boolean;
+   agentToolsError: string | null;
+   allTools: ToolData[];
+   allToolsLoading: boolean;
+   endConversationEnabled: boolean;
+   setEndConversationEnabled: (value: boolean) =&gt; void;
+ };
+ 
+ export function ToolsTabContent({
+   agentUuid,
+   agentTools,
+   setAgentTools,
+   agentToolsLoading,
+   agentToolsError,
+   allTools,
+   allToolsLoading,
+   endConversationEnabled,
+   setEndConversationEnabled,
+ }: ToolsTabContentProps) {
+   const [toolsSearchQuery, setToolsSearchQuery] = useState("");
+   const [addToolDialogOpen, setAddToolDialogOpen] = useState(false);
+   const [deleteToolDialogOpen, setDeleteToolDialogOpen] = useState(false);
+   const [toolToDelete, setToolToDelete] = useState&lt;ToolData | null&gt;(null);
+ 
+   const filteredTools = agentTools.filter(
+     (tool) =&gt;
+       tool.name.toLowerCase().includes(toolsSearchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
+       (tool.config?.description &amp;&amp;
+         tool.config?.description
+           .toLowerCase()
+           .includes(toolsSearchQuery.toLowerCase()))
+   );
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+       {/* Header */}
+       &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between"&gt;
+         &lt;button
+           onClick={() =&gt; setAddToolDialogOpen(true)}
+           className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base font-medium bg-foreground text-background hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer"
+         &gt;
+           Add tool
+         &lt;/button&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-6"&gt;
+         {/* Left Column - Tools List */}
+         &lt;div className="col-span-2 space-y-4"&gt;
+           {/* Search Input */}
+           &lt;div className="relative"&gt;
+             &lt;div className="absolute inset-y-0 left-0 flex items-center pl-3 pointer-events-none"&gt;
+               &lt;svg
+                 className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground"
+                 fill="none"
+                 viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                 stroke="currentColor"
+                 strokeWidth={2}
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;path
+                   strokeLinecap="round"
+                   strokeLinejoin="round"
+                   d="M21 21l-5.197-5.197m0 0A7.5 7.5 0 105.196 5.196a7.5 7.5 0 0010.607 10.607z"
+                 /&gt;
+               &lt;/svg&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;input
+               type="text"
+               value={toolsSearchQuery}
+               onChange={(e) =&gt; setToolsSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
+               placeholder="Search tools"
+               className="w-full h-10 pl-10 pr-4 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent"
+             /&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           {/* Tools List / Loading / Error / Empty State */}
+           {agentToolsLoading ? (
+             &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-muted/20"&gt;
+               &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+                 &lt;svg
+                   className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin"
+                   fill="none"
+                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;circle
+                     className="opacity-25"
+                     cx="12"
+                     cy="12"
+                     r="10"
+                     stroke="currentColor"
+                     strokeWidth="4"
+                   &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     className="opacity-75"
+                     fill="currentColor"
+                     d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+                   &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+                 &lt;/svg&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           ) : agentToolsError ? (
+             &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-muted/20"&gt;
+               &lt;p className="text-base text-red-500 mb-2"&gt;{agentToolsError}&lt;/p&gt;
+               &lt;button
+                 onClick={() =&gt; window.location.reload()}
+                 className="text-base text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+               &gt;
+                 Retry
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           ) : filteredTools.length === 0 ? (
+             &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-muted/20"&gt;
+               &lt;div className="w-14 h-14 rounded-xl bg-muted flex items-center justify-center mb-4"&gt;
+                 &lt;svg
+                   className="w-7 h-7 text-muted-foreground"
+                   fill="none"
+                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                   stroke="currentColor"
+                   strokeWidth={1.5}
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     strokeLinecap="round"
+                     strokeLinejoin="round"
+                     d="M11.42 15.17L17.25 21A2.652 2.652 0 0021 17.25l-5.877-5.877M11.42 15.17l2.496-3.03c.317-.384.74-.626 1.208-.766M11.42 15.17l-4.655 5.653a2.548 2.548 0 11-3.586-3.586l6.837-5.63m5.108-.233c.55-.164 1.163-.188 1.743-.14a4.5 4.5 0 004.486-6.336l-3.276 3.277a3.004 3.004 0 01-2.25-2.25l3.276-3.276a4.5 4.5 0 00-6.336 4.486c.091 1.076-.071 2.264-.904 2.95l-.102.085m-1.745 1.437L5.909 7.5H4.5L2.25 3.75l1.5-1.5L7.5 4.5v1.409l4.26 4.26m-1.745 1.437l1.745-1.437m6.615 8.206L15.75 15.75M4.867 19.125h.008v.008h-.008v-.008z"
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/svg&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mb-1"&gt;
+                 No tools found
+               &lt;/h3&gt;
+               &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mb-4"&gt;
+                 {toolsSearchQuery
+                   ? "No tools match your search"
+                   : "No tools have been added to this agent yet"}
+               &lt;/p&gt;
+               &lt;button
+                 onClick={() =&gt; setAddToolDialogOpen(true)}
+                 className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base font-medium border border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+               &gt;
+                 Add tool
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           ) : (
+             &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden"&gt;
+               {/* Table Header */}
+               &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-[1fr_2fr_auto] gap-4 px-4 py-3 border-b border-border bg-muted/30"&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                   Name
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                   Description
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="w-10"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               {/* Table Body */}
+               {filteredTools.map((tool) =&gt; (
+                 &lt;div
+                   key={tool.uuid}
+                   className="grid grid-cols-[1fr_2fr_auto] gap-4 px-4 py-4 border-b border-border last:border-b-0 hover:bg-muted/20 transition-colors"
+                 &gt;
+                   {/* Name Column */}
+                   &lt;div className="flex items-center"&gt;
+                     &lt;div className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                       {tool.name}
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   {/* Description Column */}
+                   &lt;div className="flex items-center"&gt;
+                     &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground line-clamp-2"&gt;
+                       {tool.config?.description || "—"}
+                     &lt;/p&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   {/* Delete Button */}
+                   &lt;div className="flex items-center"&gt;
+                     &lt;button
+                       onClick={() =&gt; {
+                         setToolToDelete(tool);
+                         setDeleteToolDialogOpen(true);
+                       }}
+                       className="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-muted-foreground hover:text-red-500 hover:bg-red-500/10 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+                       title="Remove tool from agent"
+                     &gt;
+                       &lt;svg
+                         className="w-5 h-5"
+                         fill="none"
+                         viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                         stroke="currentColor"
+                         strokeWidth={1.5}
+                       &gt;
+                         &lt;path
+                           strokeLinecap="round"
+                           strokeLinejoin="round"
+                           d="M14.74 9l-.346 9m-4.788 0L9.26 9m9.968-3.21c.342.052.682.107 1.022.166m-1.022-.165L18.16 19.673a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.244 2.077H8.084a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.244-2.077L4.772 5.79m14.456 0a48.108 48.108 0 00-3.478-.397m-12 .562c.34-.059.68-.114 1.022-.165m0 0a48.11 48.11 0 013.478-.397m7.5 0v-.916c0-1.18-.91-2.164-2.09-2.201a51.964 51.964 0 00-3.32 0c-1.18.037-2.09 1.022-2.09 2.201v.916m7.5 0a48.667 48.667 0 00-7.5 0"
+                         /&gt;
+                       &lt;/svg&gt;
+                     &lt;/button&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               ))}
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           )}
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         {/* Right Column - In-built Tools */}
+         &lt;InbuiltToolsPanel
+           endConversationEnabled={endConversationEnabled}
+           setEndConversationEnabled={setEndConversationEnabled}
+         /&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       {/* Add Tool Dialog */}
+       &lt;AddToolDialog
+         isOpen={addToolDialogOpen}
+         onClose={() =&gt; setAddToolDialogOpen(false)}
+         agentUuid={agentUuid}
+         agentTools={agentTools}
+         allTools={allTools}
+         allToolsLoading={allToolsLoading}
+         onToolsAdded={(tools) =&gt; setAgentTools((prev) =&gt; [...prev, ...tools])}
+       /&gt;
+ 
+       {/* Delete Tool Confirmation Dialog */}
+       &lt;DeleteToolDialog
+         isOpen={deleteToolDialogOpen}
+         onClose={() =&gt; {
+           setDeleteToolDialogOpen(false);
+           setToolToDelete(null);
+         }}
+         agentUuid={agentUuid}
+         tool={toolToDelete}
+         onToolDeleted={(toolUuid) =&gt;
+           setAgentTools((prev) =&gt; prev.filter((t) =&gt; t.uuid !== toolUuid))
+         }
+       /&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   );
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>
